Chats/Antonovich.content:
Chat with Antonovich


firstname: Antonovich
age: [REDACTED]
sex: Male
registration: [REDACTED]
occupancy: [REDACTED]
rank: None
accountStatus: REDACTED
company: Self employed

Messages


                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

That’s everything I have.
Police reports.
Maybe they’ll tell you more than they told me.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

What the fuck?
What are you doing on our server?
I’m sending my boys to you right now — they’ll beat all that curiosity out of you real quick.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Working.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Let’s see how funny you’ll find it when my guys show up to rearrange your face.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

I wonder if your boys will still show up when they find out about Emilia.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

…What?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Don’t worry.
I won’t tell anyone. I don’t care about that.
I’m working — and I need information about who stole the cargo.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

I already told those freaks that we had nothing to do with it.
Do I look like an idiot who’d go against the cartel?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

But you know who did.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

If I knew — I would’ve sold that info a long time ago.
But I think I can help you…
if you decide not to talk about what you know.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Deal.




                  
                  Antonovich  (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Look at this file.
📄 dhg3vhkjerbktrvhcjkdhbkjgfnjkvchdkjbghrjk3_preview.jpg




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:41) 
                  
                

Thanks.

Chats/Augustus-Nordman.title: Chat with Augustus Nordman
Chats/Augustus-Nordman.content:
Chat with Augustus Nordman
Messages


                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Alright. That’s all I can give you. Please don’t contact me again. I’ve said enough.




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Who the hell is this?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Mister Nordman, you are a hard man to find. I represent a private company - History Unfolded. Would you mind answering some questions?




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

In other circumstance i would tell you to piss the fuck off, but considering you were able to get my number … that much effort gives you some respect.  I assume it’s about something important ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Yes, quite. I have come to get my hands on documents, in regard to the Sky Lift demise. Yet, there are many questions about the whole thing that look suspicious.  Can you provide me with some additional information ?




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Well, the whole event is a mystery. I am not sure what documents you got your hands on, but I can share my personal opinion with you - the whole thing was a setup.  Somebody did not want that  Sky Lift to fall into the “wrong” hands. And by “wrong” I mean probably ANYONE, including USOL.
That is if we are talking about the Martian one, because there have been several events, but I was not on the documents for the others.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Ah, I see. So the Martian one … and what is your opinion on the real cause of destruction, if i may ask ?




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

I do not know. My report states that it was some “gas” that blew up. But that is bullshit. All witnesses report some really strange things happening before and after the explosion,  but I was “advised” to write about no reason to continue the investigation.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Who forced you ?




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

I do not know. I was “advised” by Colonel Kirch, who was working in CDC at that time.  As far as I know, he “retired” shortly after, and I got promoted instead. I am very happy about that outcome and do not wish to test my luck.
So all I can tell you is that most of that Sky Lift is still in place, holding its secrets. It is probably guarded by CORE forces, but still, maybe one day we will find the truth. Maybe even YOU will do it.  Just be extra cautious.


I can share this with you.  That’s all I have left from that time and place. Maybe it will help somehow.

📄 Skylift Photo



                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

My deepest thanks. I hope you will find solace knowing that someone will keep looking.




                  
                  Augustus Nordman (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Yes, somehow it comforts me. But please, do not try to contact me any more. I am a retired veteran and I would like to end my days happily, in bed instead of some dumpster on a random asteroid.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:36) 
                  
                

Understood, thank you.

Chats/Aurana-Strogova.title: Chat with Aurana Strogova
Chats/Aurana-Strogova.content:
Chat with Aurana Strogova
Messages


                  
                  Me (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Appreciated, and thanks for having me. This looks like a thing I was hoping for.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Hello. My name is Aurana Strogova, I will be your handler for the duration of the Contract. First of all, please remind yourself of the terms and conditions written in it, we consider it crucial that you follow those closely. Your task is to uncover some secrets that we find … intriguing. We have several files in our possession that our intelligence service was able to acquire. Most of them are scans and photos. These files are not in the best condition, but, trust me, it took a lot of effort to get them. Each of the files contain some information that may or may not be useful in your investigation. But they all provide some context to the events that we are interested in.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We believe that things that are happening right now, the ones that you may have heard from the news, are somehow connected to those documents. Your main goal in this investigation would be the uncovering of such connections. I fully understand the “vagueness” of the task but consider it a test of your abilities and a tribute to the secrecy we operate in.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We, in turn, would provide you with several tools that you might find handy, but feel free to use any open source intelligence that you can find.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Additionally, please note that your FREEL ID will be required to access the majority of the information we will be providing to you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Understood




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Good. Keep going.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Here are the files I was talking about.  Inside you can find information about some experiments that happened somewhere in the past. The problem is - we do not know where.  Besides, we are not even sure it’s what we think it is,  so that’s why we have hired you to help. We all need to be discrete about it, so try to minimize information leaks. It could become deadly.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Got it




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

This is serious, don’t take it lightly.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Now, you need to upgrade your clearance level to get more access. Try using the CLI  command “chmod 555 Video” and we’ll work from there.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Ok, I’ll keep digging.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Don’t rush. Gain clearance first, then look closer. Some of those files weren’t meant to be seen.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Good job. Even if it looks simple, not many can do it nowadays. Talk about a lost generation …  But anyways, my system shows you now have all required access to proceed, so try watching the video. It is partially corrupt, but maybe it’s possible to fix it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

It will take some time




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

In any case — do your best.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Finally, Good work on getting all the information. You have passed the test. Some may say it was not an easy one … not that i agree with that, but my client is pleased with your progress.


The point here is - we suspect that all those experiments and events of the past affect our current reality. By how much ? We do not know. And it is up to you to find out.
My client is confident that you would be able to handle this quest. But be cautious. There are people that would kill for the information you have now. The deeper you go the harder and more dangerous it will get. Failure is not an option.
Now, we are working on obtaining additional information on the matter, and I will share it with you as I get it.  The only problem is - it’s random. We do not know what and when we will get from our sources. So be ready for everything.
One last thing. My client thinks that it’s not a single location described in all those files, there could be several. So if you find something - try to uncover that too. Won’t hurt and might give us additional angle for the main thing.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

finally, no more games. I’m ready for the whole thing




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Just remember — readiness and greed look the same from a distance. Both get people killed if they stop thinking. Stay sharp.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We have a new task for you. Your employer would like you to take a look at the Sky Lift destruction event. We don’t think it was just an accident, there’s something behind it.
The only remaining traces of the incident are stored on an old USOL CDC archive node.
You’ll need to connect to it through the Terminal and extract whatever files are still readable.
Your task is to uncover it and report your findings.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

While you were pulling data from the USOL node, our team managed to recover one more fragment related to the Sky Lift incident.
It wasn’t stored on USOL — we found it through a separate channel, partially reconstructed from CORE oversight traffic.
I’ve added the file to your workspace.
Now we need to identify any individuals who might still be alive and connected to the event.
If anyone is still active in the system, we need to know.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I assume you’ve gone through all the material. From what I see, there’s no single version of events we can rely on completely.


The employer is ready to move this case further up the chain, but first they need to know what exactly you want to forward as a formal package.
Think about what makes the most sense to submit and then tell me which set you want to send.
Once you decide, I’ll register your choice and pass the package on.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Everything.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Okay.
I’ll pass it along as is.
I’ll notify you once it’s processed.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I see you’ve stumbled upon a file, which seems to be a report of some sorts, but it is very damaged.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Here’s a new task for you.
My client thinks that it is somehow related to the experiments we are investigating.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I need you to check it out and find a solution for it. It’s in your best interest. Maybe it’s something, but might be nothing at all.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Good luck.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Whatever you need, “boss”.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Let’s see where this one takes us. Keep me updated if you find anything unusual.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We have a new task for you. You might have seen recent news about the “LRMD” weapons system being presented by CORE Arms.
Our sources were able to gather some information for you, but didn’t have time to analyze it. So that would be up to you. It looks like those files contain information about the origins of the LRMD program.
That is all we have. The objective is to analyse this information and find any possible clues about the weapon systems and their point of origin.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Willco




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

The files are already on your desktop. Get started.
📄 0b6d65fbb495beb6c0ddee8cb4f471f7.jpg
📄 0b6d65fbb495beb6c0ddee8cb4f471f7_preview.jpg
📄 514385937e42b81791957cccea6ddd68.jpg
📄 514385937e42b81791957cccea6ddd68_preview.jpg
📄 5878b60bacaec23567b9ba6cef59ab6c.jpg
📄 5878b60bacaec23567b9ba6cef59ab6c_preview.jpg
📄 86f1df3794ccc0e1515df83ec6fd5ad5.jpg
📄 86f1df3794ccc0e1515df83ec6fd5ad5_preview.jpg
📄 a5e4494bef89358219af9ce812ce8e93.jpg
📄 a5e4494bef89358219af9ce812ce8e93_preview.jpg




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

While you’re dealing with that, I’ve got an update for you. Some idiot kept all the passwords in a text file. Take a look — maybe something will match your files.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Did you manage to find anything?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I found a mention of Artemis, but nothing else.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

That’s it? Dig deeper. Check if you can locate a directory through the terminal. Scan everything.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

What’s the status of your search?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I’ve managed to find several files. Forwarding everything I could recover.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Excellent work.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

My team has informed me of your progress. It looks like you are heading in the right direction. We just need you to finalize everything and share the results.


Just to be clear, we have hired you to have a separate and independent opinion on the events in question, and so far you have not disappointed.
We will send you additional information as we get it. Cross check everything, go back to the documents you already have, try contacting people from those documents … we need to find out what happened, where and how. Keep working and report your findings.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Understood. I’m starting right now.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Good. Keep me updated.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We are still missing several pieces of the picture. If there is something specific you require to proceed — let me know. I’ll try to provide whatever is available.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I need all available cargo manifests related to the case. Anything you can obtain.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We have received your request for assistance. Although it was quite a task, we were able to acquire the cargo manifest you were looking for. The file is badly corrupted though, but for you this shouldn’t be a problem.. Feel free to contact me if you  have any other questions.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Were you able to extract anything meaningful from the documents?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I’ve got a ship name, but there was nothing else in that manifest. I think the only viable place to look for the answers would be a Council  Trade and Shipments database, aside from the CORIE system itself …




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I would not advise you to access CORIE system code, as it would trigger an alarm and consequences that we all do not want to face. But as for the Council security, it has been notoriously bad, so I will provide you with a  site with their archived database. trade-shipment.corie Try looking into it, maybe that would give you something.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Appreciated




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Keep me informed




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

How is your investigation progressing?


Do you require additional data, or perhaps access to old information streams?


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Do you know if there were any news channels covering agricultural incidents?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I am not certain. Several historical channels were archived years ago and most of them are barely operational now.


However, my team extracted a list of IDs that might still be reachable.
Try checking them — perhaps one of these contains what you’re looking for.


                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Possible channels:


ID 159338
ID 748036
ID 406105
ID 969355
ID 543978


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Got it. I’ll check them.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

What were you able to gather?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I have completed my research.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

And?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

This is fucked up. I am sure you know where all this crap is located.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes we did, it’s Mars, and now you know it.  But … we needed to know if you were going to be helpful, and the documents you were able to find prove that you are. Besides, you have shown your skills, so we are eager to continue our work together. But first, please present your findings




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

So be it.  First of all - that creepy biological stuff. It seems that the main production area is the “Generational farm”. But that is a dead end for now, as I need to get access to their data, or go through their database on site, which is impossible right now. I would love to see those fuckers get exposed, so no one gets free pass for all those tests and deaths




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I understand your anger and we will try to help you. But please, continue




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

The railguns - I’ve got a plan for a facility, a “Gobbler”  mining outpost. It seems there is some complex inside a mountain. You might want to send a team there to check it out, if you can




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, my employer told me that he had found that complex earlier, but was not able to breach it. Besides, we did not know that the origins of the complex are connected to the Railguns. This is good information and we will double our efforts thanks to you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Great. Now in regards to the Skylift. It’s all mystical shit. I do not believe anything I read and the people I talked to were very vague.  Getting inside the complex, OR getting additional information, including witness statements could slightly lift up the veil of secrecy, but I doubt that we can achieve anything without accessing the Skylift.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I feared you would say that. My employer agrees with your assumption, but direct access is impossible for now.  And is likely not going to be possible for quite some time. We will keep looking into our options further on. Anything else?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Last thing - couplings. The ship that was delivering them has definitely passed through a dock at REPNODE-M7 station. It looks to be a Martian orbiting station for Core Tech, or maybe that’s the same one that CEDRT uses nowadays for “martian relief effort”.  I’d bet we can find a lot of information by sending an operative there.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I see. We will take a look at it. You have done well. We will process all the information you provided and act on it.  So, I would suggest that you’d be ready for a deployment, if you would be up to continue our work together.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Perfect. Your task is considered accomplished and you will get your reward.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We have reviewed your prior progression and are happy to say that your results are considered highly valuable to our general effort. Therefore, my employer has decided to offer you a new, extended contract and a transit to a new location.


Through our sources we were able to find you a spot on the REPNODE-M7 station as a member of the maintenance crew. The credentials would be ready soon.
If you are interested, please use this SuV6oI6J to update your system.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

The plot thickens, haha. Yeah, I am all in.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Beautiful. As you see, your new system has additional tools now, but not all of them are available from your current location. They would open up as soon as you get to the station.


No need to worry about your data - it would all be stored in a secure data packet and sent to a new location while you would be in transit. This measure will ensure that nothing gets intercepted over the web.
At the same time, due to the same security precautions we can not purchase you a ticket to a ship, because the money could be traced. So I would ask you to do it yourself.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I think you guys are overcomplicating things, but sure, I will do it.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Perfect. But as I see the ship would be one of those KF-507 transit shuttle models, meaning it will take some time for it to get to a dock near you. And then, obviously, it will take even more time to transit to mars.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

You are free to do whatever you like while waiting, but I would personally suggest finishing all the business that you have left, if any, and prepare for what is coming.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Hello. Just checking up on you and keeping up to date.  Our employer asked me to inform you that preparations for your new mission are undergoing. Your new base of operations  would be ready the moment you dock at a space station. We are confident that your mission would be a success but you have to be ready for it. Additional resources would be available to you later, as you start progressing through the tasks.


Keep in mind that the station does have many entertainment options or equipment shops, so make sure to take everything you need from your current location.


                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

If everything is ready … safe travels. I will contact you as soon as you arrive. Good luck.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Thank you. I hope to not die of boredom during the flight, will try to find something to do.  Looking forward to working on that new mission. And even though my guts tell me it’s gonna be dangerous … I’m all in.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Hey. Seems you have arrived safely. How was your flight?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Well, you know, can’t say it was boring. Got a few new things to learn and some friends to acquire. By the way… do you want to talk about Jean?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I was wondering if you’d ask. We can talk about it if you’d like.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

So, I don’t really know where to start. How do you feel about all of it?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I feel free. My whole life was basically a golden cage. There was no reason for my existence, and now there is. My work for Osiris means a lot to me. These people want to make things right and I want to help them with that.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, I understand. By the way I’m sorry that I had to read your diaries - there was no other way to find that information.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

It’s fine, and it’s actually good to have less secrets, as we would be moving forward with our investigation. There are so many secrets buried on that planet that having none between us makes me feel much better.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

That’s good to hear honestly. Tell me though, is there anything you’d like to tell me about Vladimir or Jake? Like your perspective.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Vladimir is a fine person on the inside, but sometimes he does things that make me uncomfortable. He is a zealot of some sorts, truly devoted to the cause and ready to do anything to make the thing happen. I feel like there is much more of him behind the facade but with all the time we have worked together I was not able to break through that barrier. He is not a trusting person, you know. Maybe you would be able to get through it if you would work with him more.


As for Jake… I am honestly grateful that he happened to be in my life. Gave me a harsh reality check. Without him I could have ended up dead or joining some random company of people without any meaningful achievements.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Are you talking about Gravers?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

No, no. Those guys were good to me, kind even. I think they replaced my real family for the time being. But now I see them only as a useful tool, with some part of sentiment included.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Have you tried to find more information about Jack?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

No, Vladimir warned me not to. He said that guy is dangerous and could interfere in our work. His presence always felt cold. Something soothing cold, and sometimes harsh. But never like a kind and forgiving one. He has been very charming and endearing, and honestly, I felt for it at some point, but looking back now… he always was somewhere else, “not present” if you’d like.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

You know, I have talked to him, he helped me get that link to your server. He said he was worried about you, and even told me he kinda fell for you.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Oh… do you believe that to be true?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I don’t know honestly. Might have been a manipulation. But I have not told him anything about you aside from the fact you are alive. He does not know your new name or anything else, and I am not planning to tell him. Was he honest while speaking about you? May be. He helped you escape after all, even if pursuing his own goals. But what I can surely say is that he is dangerous indeed. I think that I will be hearing from him, this guy will try to use me for whatever schemes he is up to.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Just make sure you tell me about it. If things escalate I will relay that to my superiors.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Speaking of, whom will I be working for, officially?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

We thought about it. Honestly, we did not suspect that you will get all the information that fast, and we were hoping to uncover things for you while you will be working with us here, but since you already know who we are - might as well offer you work for Osiris officially. But at the same time, your cover up here is a CEDRT engineer, with planetside access, while your contract with History Unfolded is still active in the system. So, honestly, it would be easier to maintain your current status. You will be officially employed as a History Unfolded private investigator, uncovering the secrets of the universe. Sounds fun and mysterious, isn’t it? But at the same time you will have access to more of our Osiris corporate resources and tools.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

This is a bit complicated, but ok. If that makes things easier for you I’m fine with it. So what now? Where do we start?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Start from picking up all the trails you have found already. And I just want to say - it’s good that you are here and working with us. We need people like you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Thank you. I will contact you shortly. And I’m happy to be doing all this with you guys as well.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

So, I assume you are fully ready to start? Did you get familiar with your new system?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, all is fine and I am ready. Where do we begin?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Well, first of all you are at the REPNODE-M7, orbiting Mars on a geo-stationary orbit, the monitoring and emergency response station owned by CEDRT (CORE Emergency Disaster Response Team). This is where the whole “monitoring” part happens. We believe that this station receives and intercepts all incoming and outgoing communications traffic from the planet and then blocks it. Like a giant orbital firewall if you’d like. There are, presumably, no other installations like that at the planet’s orbit, so we are not sure how it all works. Possibly, there could be some relay stations on the asteroids or maybe even planetside installations that serve as the interdiction nodes. We would actually like to know more about it.


Secondly, you need to get properly acquainted with your new tool - CODEX. You will receive a lot of information and it is the only way not to lose it all. CODEX will contain copies of any data files you receive and all the other useful information including logs of your previous interactions. You do not need to do anything about it - it would all happen automatically. Consider it our gift to make your life easier.
But, all things considered, your first task should be maintaining your cover. To do that, you’ll need to get in touch with your superior — a guy by the name of Chris Tong. He’s your “ring leader,” or whatever they call their managers. But first, let’s get a better idea of what kind of person he is. I’ll send you the details; once you’ve read through them, they’ll be added to your CODEX.
Go through all the files as thoroughly as possible, find his profile in the DATABASE, and check the link he left in one of the screenshots.
Please contact me after you do all that. I’ll be waiting.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Will do, thank you for your help.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Hey. I took a look at the files you sent me about that Chris guy. I mean, he looks really weird. A solo work-driven technomaniac that creates weird dual purpose drones… and you guys say that CIS let him through? My gut tells me he is totally not ok! Is that another one of your agents?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

No, sadly no. We don’t have much on him. He is really not a very social person. Did you check that link that was in the file?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, it leads to some sort of a server but seems to be corrupt. Or maybe I am missing something.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Actually! Let me show you something. We have been developing that for you to use for a bit. Well, not only for you of course but you will be a beta-tester if you’d like. I’m adding a NETWORK MAP to your system. It’s a new feature that helps you navigate all the servers you will find. Consider this like a location map or something like that.


It is also an intelligence tool which would show you nearby servers and nodes that would lead to remote locations. You can take a look at it later on of course, I am just giving you a brief description.
This NETWORK MAP currently shows only a small portion of what will be available to you later — just your Home Server and a few servers nearby. The program has many features and nuances, but the key thing to understand is that it allows you to build chains of connections between servers, linking them into a unified system. You can follow one branch at a time, connecting step by step, but you’re free to change your route at any moment and reconfigure the chain differently.
When you connect to a server, you’ll also see the servers linked to it. And once connected, you gain access to all the sites hosted on that server — which is exactly what we need right now.
Find the server RM7-E1L2CT — it’s tied to the site you discovered earlier. Keep in mind it might be located behind another server, so try connecting through the nearby ones — experiment a bit, and you’ll find the right path.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I’ll take a look and see what I can find.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Once you’ve connected to the target server, you can check the browser — access to the site will be granted automatically.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Got it, I’ll check it out.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I’ve got the file. It was the only thing on the site, like it was specifically set up to share certain files.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Okay. Were you able to open it?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

No, not really. It has a weird extension that requires specialized software it seems. Could you help with that?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I doubt that’s a problem. Look for the program on the market. Just use the NETWORK MAP, select your home server, and open the market. You’re looking for a Decryptor that can open this file. Take a good look around the market — I’m sure you’ll be using it a lot.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Okay… New tricks eh… will do, thanks again!




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I’ve opened the file. It contains a drone schematic and a link — RM7-E1L2CT.local/storage. The link seems to lead to the same server, but I can’t access it.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Looks like it requires admin-level access, which in our case means… hacking! Select the target server on the NETWORK MAP, then you’ll need to log in — but since you don’t have the appropriate software yet, you’ll have to acquire it first. I’m sure you’re used to this by now, but the only way to get the required tools is to buy them on the market, legally. After all, you’re an official CEDRT member now.


The simplest option will do — “Porter-lite r4” should be perfect for you. But! Keep in mind that some software requires specific hardware. So after purchasing it, disable your current program before installing the new one. Or upgrade your hardware if you feel it’s necessary.
Once you gain access, head into the server’s file system. Look for anything related to Tong and download it.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Got it, I’ll check it out.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

So, how did it go? Did you find anything?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes and no. It seems that this Chris guy has lost some relatives on Mars. My bet would be that it happened during the revolts or the skylift explosion.
He is looking for his parents, but he is not that old, so there might be some additional context we do not know.
But the most important thing is that he is a professional drone engineer. He created Mantis. Have you heard about it?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, that is one of the most efficient combat aerial drones on the market. I would call it luck that we have him here, and that we know his secret.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I would not confront him directly. Who knows who else might be watching him. Talented individuals like that are never left alone completely, even after their “retirement”.
Besides, he has a sister and her location is unknown. It might be worth finding out if she is on the station.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Most definitely. But be very cautious.
You should try to befriend him and help with whatever he needs. He could become a major asset for us — or a liability.
If he has been digging into the events on Mars, he might know something valuable.


On another note — how did your new system perform?


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Just fine. It took some time to figure things out and earn some credits, but overall it works well. I understand how it all functions now and I am ready for new challenges.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Very well. Consider this an introduction — successfully completed, as always.
I will need some time to prepare new tasks, so wait for further communication from me or others.
In the meantime, you are free to earn additional credits or familiarize yourself with the system.


Actually… before we proceed — did anything else come up during your search?


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Now that you mention it — yes. I found a file. Something about a TX-71 board. Have you heard about it?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Funny you mention that. Something with that name came up about a week ago. Terra Mater has been looking for those prototypes and stockpiling them.
Why — we don’t know. That sounds like something they would do.
What exactly did you find?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

The file was on Mr. Tong’s server, which probably means he was involved in its development.
Do you think we can get our hands on it?




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Depends on where it is located.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Some “Kuote” outpost. I have the coordinates and what look like access codes.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

That is not near Mars. Good that you have the coordinates and keys, but you cannot go there yourself — for obvious reasons.
It might be time to use mercs.


But first — you need to upload those codes into a physical chip. Only then can you send it with whoever takes the job.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yeah, figured as much. I’ll upload them to a dog tag or a key card and store it for now.
Next step is to find someone reliable to handle the job.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Check the market. There are always people willing to work — for a price.
Just make sure they are trustworthy.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Will do.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

So, how did it all go?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Fine. Almost smooth even. There was someone else looking for that board. My guys got rid of them. Thank God I have hired a competent crew, but I do not like being watched.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Nothing indicates that your infrastructure had been compromised. Probably just a coincidence. That or the owner of the diary finally decided to act.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Yes, understand but still. I will be extra cautious from now on. On the bright side of things - those mercs are a decent bunch and I would love to keep them around.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I am sure they would be available. People like that are always open for business. What about the board?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

I am going to just stash it up for now. I have a feeling it will be of good use to us later on.




                  
                  Aurana Strogova (2026-04-21 09:25:41) 
                  
                

Good choice. Anyway, you are now one step closer to understanding how it all works, and I am kind of proud that you did it all so fast.
So now, we all need to prepare for the next steps that would soon come to be.
Meanwhile, working undercover means you need to have all sorts of assets at your disposal to effectively complete your objectives.
You would need to acquire certain reputation levels with various groups and individuals, as well as getting some specific items, most likely, and that could mean money.
So I would suggest that you look for some jobs on the market here. Each of them could grant you different rewards so better do as many as possible.
Don’t hesitate to hire mercenaries by the way. Could be useful as well.
I will contact you as soon as we are ready to proceed with the next objective. Meanwhile - stay in touch. And good luck, your real work starts now.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-24 20:33:38) 
                  
                

Okay… New tricks eh… will do, thanks again!

Chats/Daniel_Bailey.title: Chat with Daniel Bailey
Chats/Daniel_Bailey.content:
Chat with Daniel Bailey


firstname: Daniel
lastname: Bailey
age: 31
sex: Male
registration: Sector 7, Webb Dome, Luna
occupancy: Freelancer
rank: Civilian
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Self employed

Messages


                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Right, here you go bro, good luck with that mess.
connect PMC_signals —password=trd078bp
Private-Club.PMC.corie Login: ops.review_4415 Password: V4ultR0tate-77




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Hey Daniel, I think we have a common friend.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Who in the fuck are you, friend?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

I am looking for Jay-Jay.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

What have you heard about J?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

I know that to find her I am going to need equipment to intercept PMC signals. Can you help?




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

I don’t like strangers. She’s not missing, she just disappears for months on end sometimes, it’s normal. What do you want from her, anyway?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Her mother is looking for her.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Her mom sent you? shit.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Can you help me Daniel?




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

You’re wasting your time with PMC signals, but okay. We aren’t a charity organization though. If you want help, you have to help us too.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

We have a huge issue with those bastards at the MO Chemical, we stumbled upon something I’m sure they did not want us to see and they’re rightfully worried about it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

I can’t help you target a company just because they are polluting.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

That’s not it at all, we aren’t delusional hippies. Let’s say their product lines extend beyond their official catalogues and are focused on very new models. We have some guys in the group who can do something about it, the proper official way too. We spent fucking ages collecting all this evidence but everything is covered up. This guy Harry Wells is a grade-A PDF and steers the ship.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

That’s all the information I get?




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

You can look into him yourself, detective. Only have to ask one person to know he’s been accused of blackmail and systemic cover-ups, to name a few of the things I care to repeat. This guy cooks drugs to sell to these poor drifters and leaves the waste acid barrels around so the junkies try and get high off it and their flesh just peels off but they can’t stop themselves from trying. People say he keeps them there cuz he likes to watch. USOL turns a blind eye to him, there’s no way they don’t know.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Seems like a nice enough guy.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

By USOL standards I suppose he is a saint. We just need you to hack into his server and put our “white-list” in there, we can do the rest.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

I’ll see what I can do… And you’ll help me out too?




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Yes. We have the equipment to intercept the PMC signals but nothing to decrypt it. Let me know when it’s done and you can see for yourself.
hwells.home / Em0Ch3m
The address to add gravver_node_5,gravver_node_9




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

You’re white-listed.




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

That fucking fast? You must be good. J said her mom would come looking for her if she needed it but where did she find you? You’re real, man, I can tell. Thank you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

We had a deal




                  
                  Daniel Bailey (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

No, I don’t think you realize what you actually just did. We can actually put a stop to Wells now, the sick fucker. We have been working on this for months. You did something good here today, you’ll always be one of us now.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:52) 
                  
                

Thank you, I’ll do better when I find Jay-Jay.

Chats/James_Curtis_Fung.title: Chat with James Curtis Fung
Chats/James_Curtis_Fung.content:
Chat with James Curtis Fung


firstname: James Curtis
lastname: Fung
age: 34
sex: Male
registration: Apartment 12631, Krakov complex, Webb Dome, Luna
occupancy: PMC Contractor
rank: Corporal
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Private Club PMC

Messages


                  
                  Me (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

I do not want to know. Let’s just stay in touch.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Hello, friend. It seems that you are trying to find something you are not supposed to. Are you sure you want to do that ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Who are you ?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Does it matter ? Tell me though, what or whom are you looking for here ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I am looking for information about Jack. Do you know him ?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Maybe. But why are you looking for him ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I need his help in finding a girl. Jean. She was kidnapped and another person asked me to find her.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Jean ? Huh … Listen, I know who you are, I know what you want, but this is bigger than you. If you would insist on finding me - i will contact you, but think twice before doing that. There will be no turning back.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

What do you mean ? I have been through a lot already.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Take your time and think again. I will contact you soon and would need your decision.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I have been through a lot already, I am ready for whatever. Let’s get with it.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

So, you are persistent. You made quite an effort to find someone who never existed. Yes, I understand that it may sound weird but I am sure you understand by now that “Jack” is not my real name. Let’s call it a “convenient callsign” if you’d like. Maybe one day I will tell you about it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Cut the crap. I know you worked for the Core and I know that you were not “just a part of the machine”. You were one of those guys that did something on Mars during the rebellion. I will get to the bottom of it, but for now I have a promise to keep - I need you to tell me what happened to Jane.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Haha. No, I was not on Mars, and I do not work for the CORE, at least not the one you can think of, but that’s for later. Let’s talk about Jean first.
See, you may think of me in many different ways but I got attached to her as well.
I have been tasked to infiltrate this PMC company and keep an eye on their activities. When i came to know about the girl she took my whole attention.
The girl was a rebellious one and I have a soft eye for those … should have gotten over it long ago. But oh well.


Anyways, like I said, I got too attached to her and when the PMC’s received their “capture” order … I just had to do something. I talked her into escaping, or let’s say our wishes were mostly the same, so I helped her escape and make it look like a failed kidnapping attempt with a very unfortunate end.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Hold on ! So you are saying that she IS alive ? What happened ? When did you guys part ways ? Where ?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Well that is something I am unsure of. See, when we came to that garage near the base, I kinda left her, because I spotted someone walking nearby that could not have been there. I went to check on that “someone” but my “friends” from PMC popped up just in time to prevent our little conversation. After that - I have no clue what happened to her. If she is alive - good for her. Probably best that she does not follow in my footsteps.
But that is where I need your help actually. I want to make sure that all traces are gone and she is safe. Like I said, think of me as you like but I feel for her and want only the best for her. So I need you to try and find her, if she is even alive.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

You do not sound too confident about.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Well, you know, she had many enemies, one of them is very powerful and influential. She got lucky that she got so far anyways, but there is no promise that her path will proceed.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

You sound like a philosopher. I don’t think I like that.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Listen … you probably don’t understand that but I will have to make sure my cover is not blown. Means eliminating some people. Probably many people. And in normal circumstances you would have been one of those. But you are on a ship (yes, I know where you are), and I have a use for you. So consider that a lucky day.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

If you need something - ask. There is no point in being a cocky dick.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Good … keep the attitude. It might serve you well at some point. But enough of swinging. Let’s get to business. There is not much I can tell you about her, but there is 1 thing I can share. Jane had a private server that she mentioned only twice. I am sure that if she would have wanted to leave some bread crumbs for her mother, whom she adored, she would have done it there. So here’s the address jj_private. Do with it what you must, but make sure to tell me what you find. I do not want to interfere in her life further on but it would make me sleep better if i knew what has happened to her. Even if she is dead.


In case you need additional motivation - I promise to answer several questions about CORE, Mars or any other stuff you would need to know. And I can share a lot, for a price !


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

That might help my main investigation for sure, but honestly - i do not trust you at all. So only the fact that I have promised help to Vladimir Semakin would make me proceed with this.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Vladimir ? Ha, that is the guy I wanted to have a chat with. I am sure that he told you some teary story about himself and the girl - trust nothing. He works for an organization that has been monitoring those PMC’s and me personally for several months. I even thought that they would have something to do with her disappearance … Well, I’ll leave that to you to decide. Just keep in mind that this guy is not that simple. Whomever he told you he is - that is a lie. I think I know him from the old days and he was either CORE or an affiliate. I would not have trusted him. Even more than myself.
Actually, if my memory does not fail me … try to find information about “Operation Aquarium”. That rings a bell … It was one of the “independent” groups’ operations against the CORE facility. It was all over the news about a decade ago. If the information is still there and not classified - try your luck.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

So, what now ?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Well, you are kind of a guy that may be useful to me in future. I have lots of things to share with you, but that would require trust, and it’s a two-way road you know. Let’s start with Jane, and then we will talk more. Ping me on this messenger when you have found something. And deal with that Vladimir guy. I don’t want him anywhere near myself.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Very well. You have got my attention. I will help you since our interests align. I will keep you posted on the situation.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Cool! Oh, and keep in mind - I can and will contact you if I need something from you. You made a choice, and regardless of whether you like me or not - we are in this together now.


Oh and yes, I will surely contact you Jean’s server address after I double check it and its availability. You would have to find your way in yourself though. I’ll keep in touch. Good luck!


                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

As promised, here’s the address jj_private. It seems the server is unstable so might not be always available. Maybe a remote node problem or something. So try to access it as soon as possible. And keep me informed please.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Yeah, thanks for your help.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Did you find anything?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Yes, and I don’t think I want to tell you.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Is it that bad? Is she dead?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

No, she is alive. But that is about everything I would say.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Oh, come on. I thought we were starting to get along.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Listen, I don’t like you somehow, and I definitely don’t trust you. I still don’t know why you were there in the first place. What did you have to do with Jean’s father?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

My boy… you should have understood by now. I had to keep an eye on her father while pretending to be part of the PMC. It seemed obvious enough that you would see that for yourself. Sadly, Jean’s mission got in contradiction with the main assignment, so I had to push her a bit to finish it all faster, without blowing my cover.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

What was your main mission?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Oh, it’s a secret, you know. We are not that close in our relations that I could tell you. But I will give you a hint - her father is one of the main guys in USOL. So keeping an eye on him would always be a good idea. He tightened his security because of that whole affair so it will be harder now, but that is not MY problem any longer.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Whom are you working for?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I am working for people that would like to keep the balance in our universe.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Are you serious now? Balance of the universe? You operate like an elephant in a china shop, leaving lots of wrecks behind you.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Sometimes you just can’t help that. But yes, I am dead serious and you should probably watch your tongue.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I am not scared that easily. But anyways, what now?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Well, my friend, as I have told you, we will work together from now on. Your skills are valuable to me so I will not hesitate to ask you for some favors when needed. And in return you can always count on my help with your affairs.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

I do not owe you anything. And you owe me something already. So why would I want to work with you?




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Because there are certain points in life where it can drastically change. And this is one of those. Listen, let’s cut the crap. I have reviewed your actions and if I wanted to harm you, it would have been enough to report your activities to the council or any local authority. Instead, I offer you a job, a very profitable one in all regards.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Fair. I will keep your offer in mind. But I would need more information about you and your “cause”, and people you work for. I am not getting involved in anything blindly any more.




                  
                  James Curtis Fung (2026-04-21 18:34:55) 
                  
                

Understandable, but all in due time. I will contact you when you get to the station. Loose ends would not cut themselves, you know…

Chats/Martin_Skypovski.title: Chat with Martin Skypovski
Chats/Martin_Skypovski.content:
Chat with Martin Skypovski


firstname: Martin
lastname: Skypovski
age: 85
sex: Male
registration: Luna, Novak Crater
occupancy: Security Consultant
rank: Colonel
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Unemployed
note: Ex-USOL CDC, policeman. The guy knows some secrets. Profile photo taken around 2100 looks like. Dude is old now …

Messages


                  
                  Me (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Thank you again. Please contact me if you would decide to share anything else.




                  
                  Martin Skypovski (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

Hello? I don’t recognize this ID. Who is this, and how did you get my contact?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

Hello Sir, sorry to bother you, I work as a PI for a historical archive. We, in “History unfolded” dedicate ourselves to upholding the truth and filling the gaps on historically important events.




                  
                  Martin Skypovski (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

Hello and nice to meet you. How can an old man help you though?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

I have a document in my possession that speaks about the events that happened with some Sky Lift. It contains your name.




                  
                  Martin Skypovski (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

Ah, that … you know, I can’t really talk about it. We all have signed NDA’s stopping us from ever discussing those events, so if you already have that report then there is not much else I can do for you.
But, you know what … i am not on an active service any longer, just consulting from time to time, so i can share some more files with you, maybe you will find them interesting.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

That would be great, thank you!




                  
                  Martin Skypovski (2026-04-21 18:08:24) 
                  
                

I am already doing you a favor by giving these documents, so please don’t push me. There is really not much i can add, besides, it has happened more than 60 years ago already … Let me be, please. And good luck with your quest.

Chats/Seamus_Malkob.title: Chat with Seamus Malkob
Chats/Seamus_Malkob.content:
Chat with Seamus Malkob


firstname: Seamus
lastname: Malkob
age: 95
sex: Male
registration: Mars
occupancy: Reverent
rank: None
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Unemployed
note: Former Brother from Mars. Has a bounty on his head. Knows about SBS4.

Messages


                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

May the Spirit guide your path, Child.




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Who are you, and why have you reached out to me?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Hello Sir.  I was wondering if you would accept my communication request at all, considering you have a bounty on your head.




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

You can call me Reverent. What is the purpose of this call, child?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

I am contacting you due to my investigation of certain events connected to the Soylent bard. Have you heard anything about it?




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

You talk in riddles. No, i have not. Please speak more plainly, or this will end fast …




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Sorry, sorry. So basically there have been a number of incidents with human bodies mutating, causing immediate death, or simply disintegrating after consuming some shady stuff. The symptoms described in those incidents are somewhat similar to the ones I saw in the document with your name in it.  It must have been a long time ago, because you are called a “Brother” there.




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

I see. So you have found the source of my curse, or you are on a way to finding it.  I am 95 years old now, and that’s because of that rite of initiation that I took there … Where was it? Mars? The valley? I do not fully remember any more … At that time I was still a Brother, yes,  but our congregation was already strong. We were worshipping our home planet, and, frankly, I still do. But that past will never allow me to return …  They … I remember them testing some … thing. They called it “SBS4”. I remember dizziness, gut pain, and then nothing.  When I woke up, my brothers told me that I have ascended now.  And those people - they left straight after. They were happy.  But then others started to die, horribly.  I knew I had to run, Mars was not a safe place for me any longer. They were hunting for me as I knew their secret. And probably because that secret was inside of me. And still is. It does not let me die, I suspect …




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Wow, just wow! Are you sure that’s the way they called it?




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Yes, “SBS4”.  They said




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Do you know who “they” were? Where did they come from? Where is that thing produced?




                  
                  Seamus Malkob (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

My child, if I had known I would have murdered them with my own hands. They are the monsters that killed many people.  I wish I could help you further but that is all I know.  I broke all contact with my fellow Brothers when I left and started anew in another place, where they were not able to find me.  My congregation here is small but very much united. I hope for them all the best and do not want my past to burden them.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:36:57) 
                  
                

Thank you so much for your help. I will continue my search and find those bastards. Rest assured, there are still people interested in the truth.
