Messages


                  
                  Simon Webb (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Truth is, there were too many questions in regards to those items. Questions that I didn’t want to answer myself. I think all that is part of something bigger, and I do not want to know anything about it. I thought I was safe after leaving the company, but since you found that trace… I have to vanish. Please do not try to contact me any further.




                  
                  Simon Webb (2026-04-21 18:08:27) 
                  
                

Um, hello. Who are you?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:27) 
                  
                

Hi, I came across a damaged report that mentions your name. It seems to describe some kind of tests connected to Viibot Automation. Would you mind helping me with it? I’m trying to find the original version




                  
                  Simon Webb (2026-04-21 18:08:27) 
                  
                

I am not sure I can help you. That was quite some time ago and I don’t really remember any details. What are you looking for, specifically?

Just digging some stuff for my client




                  
                  Simon Webb (2026-04-21 18:08:27) 
                  
                

Allright… Here’s a viibot.corie/archives to the old archive I had access to. I do not know if it still works or not, but maybe you will find what you are looking for in there.

                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:27) 
                  
                

Was it THAT bad?

Chats/Suzanna_Flanders.title: Chat with Suzanna Flanders
Chats/Suzanna_Flanders.content:
Chat with Suzanna Flanders


firstname: Suzanna
lastname: Flanders
age: 64
sex: Female
registration: Chateau Vanille, Webb Dome, Luna
occupancy: Management
rank: General Manager
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Exar-Solis

Messages


                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Thank you… I’ve sent you everything I have. Please, be careful.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Hello Mrs. Flanders. I’m sorry to reach out to you this way, but it’s about your daughter. I am conducting a private investigation into her disappearance and I need your help.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Reaching out to a grieving mother for your own morbid curiosity is a cruel cruel thing. I do not, I cannot, I will not entertain you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

This is not about any curiosity, I would not message you unless it was necessary. I think I might have something.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

What do you have? Do not, do not give me false hope I am at wits end.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I know you can tell she isn’t gone, a mother knows these things. I can tell too.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I already told the authorities everything I knew. I have been sending so many things over all but stopped taking my calls, they did. I can’t help you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

The authorities do not have the same kind of access and resourcefulness I do. Their statements were unconvincing, you never know who could be involved in this. Let me help you.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Do you think so? The whole thing seemed off to me. They barely went into her room when they came, and Douglas was handling the case. I was frantic, I am frantic, I still am. They just didn’t care, they didn’t.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I care.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

You care, do you? Who are you, anyway? Who hired you, why are you doing this?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

A known member of our community has disappeared without a trace and authorities have done nothing about clear malicious camera malfunctions let alone the disappearance. Something is not right, and it is my job to find out what that is. This could be about more than just Jean, I need to do everything I can.




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

It does feel like the authorities are not even trying, doesn’t it? It does. That’s what I have been saying.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I read through the files, from your recorded statement I could tell there was more you had to say. Can you tell me yourself, do you know anything that would help?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

They were convinced she ran away again, when they talked to me. Then they just kept talking to Douglas and they wouldn’t listen. She would not do that, she wouldn’t. She was… complicated, yes, but she wouldn’t do this to me. She wouldn’t do this to me, she always let me know she was alive when she did this.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Is this something that happened often?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Not anymore. She had these friends she would go off with but she grew out of it, she did.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Who were these friends, do you know what circles or any names?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Jean was so private about everything, like she couldn’t trust anyone. But I know she trusted me. These friends, I don’t know them or who they are or I would have hunted them down myself. She was always so cryptic when she talked to me, but she left traces of herself. I tried to tell the authorities but they didn’t even bother decrypting it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

What traces?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

She left records, her files, fragments of her diary. I can’t open half and I can’t understand the other half, but I know she left them for me to find. She wrote under the name JayJay, her pseudonym, and there’s a lot of that, a lot. She knew something was going to happen, she’s too smart not to hide everything, she wanted me to find her things.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Where would she use this pseudonym?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Forums or texting these people, she was always on them when she was younger especially. I only found out because she stitched it into some experimental suit. She said it was for Graving, she did. As if that’s the sort of thing that reassures a mother. She said they explore places, but they were no explorers.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

What do you know about these… Gravers?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

She wouldn’t tell me much, but after she kept coming home late and with bruises I had to know. They’re dangerous people, they are. I did my own digging after she disappeared, assuming she was with them.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Where can I find them?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I read up a bit on them on the Forum, grvforum.corie. They’re basically anarchists, most of them criminals in some capacity, always places they shouldn’t be. We had to get Jean out of some of her own trouble when she was young, nothing serious.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I’ll look into it. Do you think you can also send the documents you mentioned?




                  
                  Suzanna Flanders (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

Well the authorities aren’t using them and I have no use for them as they are, I’ll send over her diary entries and some old notes, saved text files, things she left. Please, just bring her home, bring my daughter home. I can’t be disappointed again.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:08:44) 
                  
                

I’ll do everything I can to find her.

Chats/Thomas_Albertson.title: Chat with Thomas Albertson
Chats/Thomas_Albertson.content:
Chat with Thomas Albertson


firstname: Thomas
lastname: Albertson
age: 32
sex: Male
registration: [REDACTED]
occupancy: Sales Department
rank: Spokesman
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: CORE Arms
note: Seems arrogant. A little bit of flattery, and who knows …

Messages


                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Right … ok.




                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Uh… hello? Do I know you?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Hello Thomas! Is that ok if I call you that? I represent a potential buyer for the railguns you have talked about recently.  We have very much enjoyed your presentation, you did a great job! My employer even asked me to hire you!




                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Haha, nice to meet you! Sure, just Thomas is fine! Thank you for your kind words, I’m flattered. Not many can appreciate a job well done nowadays. What can I do for you?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Well, like I said my employer is very much interested in those railguns. We understand that it’s for Council Security and I’m sure that the waiting list is quite long, but maybe there are special options that we can buy ?




                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

I am not sure I understand what you are talking about. What special options ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Well, maybe there are some half-ready variants, or even prototypes.  We need just a bunch of those guns, we are not as big as the main corporations.




                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

I … don’t think I can help you. There are some things i can check, but … it is a weird request




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

No no,  if it’s too much hassle then don’t worry about it ! We understand that you must be a very busy man with lots of goals to accomplish ! Your job requires perfection and you are definitely on the right track so we can wait, there is no problem.




                  
                  Thomas Albertson (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Ugh … give me a minute. I’ll try to help you.  … …  …  Okay, my database says that there are no prototypes at the warehouse or anywhere in storage. Which is weird as well.  More to say, I have no clue if there ever were any prototypes. All I can see is something called “Gobbler”, whatever that is.
To be honest, this all looks worrisome. Whom did you work for did you say ?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:37:00) 
                  
                

Just a client. No worries, thank you very much. We will contact you later when you have some models in stock, ready for sale. Thank you again !

Chats/Unknown.title: Chat with Unknown
Chats/Unknown.content:
Chat with Unknown


firstname: Unknown
age: [REDACTED]
sex: Male
registration: [REDACTED]
occupancy: [REDACTED]
rank: None
accountStatus: REDACTED
company: Self employed

Messages


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Probably.


Good hunting.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Hello, my friend. It seems you have been looking for us. What is your interest?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

What a surprise, I am honestly baffled by such an encounter. Who are you and why are you contacting me?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Like I said, it seems you have been looking for us. Or trying to find information about something that belongs to us.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I was trying to find information about the barrels that were found at a location connected to a kidnapping. Do you know anything about that?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Barrels? Maybe… Kidnapping - no. That is something we do not do. We try to avoid dealing with humans… too much drama.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

How can I trust you? What information do you have? I am trying to find anything about that missing girl. Please help me!




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

If you want information, let’s play a game. Here is a link for you. The code word is “Inception”. If you succeed - we will talk more. For now, that would be it. Good luck.
📄 FIDhhgnrjbgASUIETHSGmgSJFDBGsiertwe.jpg
📄 FIDhhgnrjbgASUIETHSGmgSJFDBGsiertwe_preview.jpg




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Wait! FUCK!




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Hello again. Now you know a bit more about us, and we, in turn, see your potential. You could fit with us … if that is something you would like. Similar minds should unite …




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Oh, actually, there is one thing that you help us with. And while you are doing that we will find you a clue.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

… go on




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

It just so happened that a group of people that were supposed to accompany one of our shipments were, sadly, deconstructed to small pieces, and sequentially, the shipment was lost. And let’s say that the real shipment owner is quite unhappy with that, and kindly asked us to solve the problem. And while we would likely be more than capable to do that … you might be a more suitable person for a job.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Wait, what do you mean “deconstructed”? Like liquified? Or was it an explosion? Did they blow up?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I believe you would be able to find that information in a police report. For us the means of their unfortunate end is unimportant.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

What was cargo?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Do you really want to know? Let’s say it was some crates.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

If you want me to actually help you, any details you can give me would be helpful. It also shows trust as you can imagine.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

We will provide you with necessary information as we see fit, for now there is not much we can tell you, aside from a group called “The Voktr” that have been seen operating in the area for the last several months. We think that they are connected to the incident.
Their leader, Anton “Antouan” Zonitch, is a somewhat well known individual in certain circles.
It might be worth starting with that. Keep us informed and we will see how we help you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Allright. But since you know that much already, why not do it all yourself?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Don’t be naive. Consider that as another test if you’d like, or just think that the mysteries of the universe are more important to us than this minor incident.


Now, off you go. Go do your thing and bring us the results.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Hey, how’s it going?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Making progress, but I’ll need dossiers on all escort team members, and a report on their DNA.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You might as well ask for access to the main CORE server… I can’t give you that. Their servers are scattered, but I heard that the data for the server with operative information is transmitted over a closed radio channel. But even if you somehow intercept it, I don’t know how you’re going to decrypt the signal. Anyway, I’ll configure one of our transmitters so your terminal can receive signals from their secure channels. Can’t help more than that.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Are you nuts? I didn’t think you would crack their code at all. A few more seconds and you’d be fried for good.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I just got in. There is a ton of data! I need personnel dossiers and DNA data of the security detail.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

No you don’t, not any more. We used what you gave us - address, password and a window. Everything else is up to us. You made a breach, we followed. And got what we needed.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You opened the door for us, you know




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I figured your case. One of the operatives lived, and he tried to burn the bridges.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Yeah, we figured. We will find him and talk to him. Or our friends will.
Anyways, your part of the bargain is fulfilled. Now it’s our term.


In regards to the girl you are looking for - she is connected to the Private Club PMC. Her “boyfriend”, or whomever he is, was working for them. And we think that he backstabbed his employer somehow. You should probably start digging in that direction, starting with their site Private-Club.PMC.corie. You’ll find something, I’m sure.
One more thing - to access their site you’ll need to stabilize the route first. Use this in the terminal:
route stabilize —target=Private-Club.PMC.corie —token=PnGU8pNHHfzI
We will stay in touch with you, good job.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Hey. I know where the guy i’m looking for is. He’s kept at a Camp Vernon, PMC ghost site. I need to get him out somehow, and I would appreciate your help.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

So you are asking us to storm a fortress to get your guy out. Do you really understand the complexity of this ? I am not saying it’s impossible but the price would be very high. And I won’t give you any guarantees.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Listen, Jack is inside. He is the key to solving this and maybe saving a human life. I think that’s a noble enough cause. I need that guy out, alive.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You “need” him. We “need” something else, so let’s cut the bullshit and talk business.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Those PMC bastards recently interfered with one of our shipments. Acid batch. They blew up a convoy.


That was a mistake.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

The cargo was loaded onto a shuttle. It was redirected toward a debris cluster. After that — signal lost.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

There is a lunar orbital reconnaissance satellite. PMC mirror node. It logs traffic in the debris sector.


It is not public.
You will connect. You will breach it. You will extract its internal scan logs. If our cargo is still out there — those logs will show it.
And while you do it, and I hope you’ll succeed - we will find a team suitable to make that madness work out.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Address to connect to the server:
connect moon_orbital_recon—password=Gsdfg53254Hsdfg




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Fine. That’s fair. I do my part, you do yours. But remember - alive.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

One object stands out. DC7-447-X. Shuttle-scale. Thermal core variance. EM pockets. Triple echo profile.


That’s not random debris. Someone flagged it manually. And then the logs were cut.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Send us the object ID.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

DC7-447-X.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

…


That matches our cargo signature profile.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

PMC knew. They marked it. They tried to retrieve it. And they failed.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Good work. This makes things much easier politically. But that’s not important. What is important is that the Team is ready to deploy.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Keep in touch. Things are about to escalate.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

The team has returned. There is good news and bad news. Well … at least from our point of view.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Go on please.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

First of all - Jack was not there. All rooms were open, holding cells as well. There was no one in the whole area.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Is that the good news ?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

No. The good news is that most of those PMC fuckers were dead. Someone slaughtered them. I would say it was a massacre. The PMC guys tried to put up a fight but failed miserably. They were outclassed and outgunned.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Yes, I get it, everyone is dead. I’m happy that you are happy. But I need to know SOMETHING about Jack. Anything. I need clues, because otherwise all I would have is that QQ Energy stuff that might as well lead nowhere too.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Well, we have been able to scrap some documents from their mainframe. It was left untouched somehow, maybe by accident, but I think it was a deliberate action. So be careful opening them.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

At least that’s something. I assume our business is concluded, for now ? All good ?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Yes. This did not cost us much as there was nothing to do. Someone did all the hard work for us. So our guys just took a small trip to a “fun” location and did some looting. I’m sure they are happy about it. I would even say that we kinda owe you a bit, so feel free to contact us if necessary. But for now - yes, we are all good.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Thank you. I will keep in touch.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Hey. I could use some help.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

That depends. Are you in trouble again or just bored?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Let’s say I am chasing a lead. Two actually. One involves a private server. The other… an old incident called Operation Aquarium.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Now that sounds interesting. You always manage to dig into the weirdest places.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Yeah well, it keeps happening. I’m trying to find information about someone named Vladimir Semakin. The trail leads to an old news archive, but the site is dead.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Dead sites are rarely dead. Just… forgotten.
Let me guess — obsolete infrastructure, abandoned search engine, and a security layer nobody bothered to update?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Something like that.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

We can help with that.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Really? No lecture this time?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You did good work for us before. We appreciate competence.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

And besides… this sounds fun.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I’ll take that as a compliment.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Here’s the deal.


That archive used to mirror its data through an intermediate grid node.
Most people never noticed it because the front-end handled everything automatically.
The node still exists.
And it still trusts outdated credentials.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Meaning?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Meaning if you get inside, you can access the archive directly.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Sounds too easy.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

It’s not.


The node has a key-file validation layer.
You will have to bypass it manually.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

So this is where I do the dirty work.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Exactly.


While you are doing that, we will prepare something useful for you.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Let me guess… something for Jane’s server?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You catch on quickly.


A brute-force password solver tuned for private nodes like that.
It should save you a lot of time.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I appreciate that.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

First things first.


Connect to this node:
connect ATLAS_INFORMATION GRID_INTERMEDIATE_ARCHIVE_SERVER —password=12345678
Inside you will find a key-file selection system.
Break it.
Once you’re done, come back to us.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

And in the meantime you build the cracking software?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Already started.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Good. Because I have a feeling Jane’s server won’t open itself.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Nothing ever does.


Good luck.


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Well well. You actually did it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You sound surprised.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Not surprised. Just impressed.


That key-file system was… inelegant.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

That’s one way to describe it.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Most people would have given up halfway through.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

I didn’t have that luxury.


Did you find anything?


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Yes.


While you were busy inside the node, we accessed the mirrored archive.
And you were right — Operation Aquarium is connected to the name you mentioned.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Vladimir Semakin.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Exactly.


The archive contained several historical documents tied to that incident.
A news broadcast transcript.
An interrogation protocol.
And something else.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

What kind of “something else”?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

A manifesto.


Group name: Technofreedom.
One of the names listed there… is Vladimir.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Well. That escalated quickly.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You asked for information.


We delivered.
We packaged the documents for you.
You will find them in a folder called:
ATLAS_ARCHIVE
on your desktop.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Nice.


What about the other thing?


                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Your password tool is ready.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Already?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

It is a relatively simple program.


But we optimized it specifically for private server authentication patterns.
It should be able to brute-force Jane’s server eventually.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Eventually?




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Expect several hours.


Encryption layers take time.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Fair enough.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

The executable is called:


passhack.exe
You will also find it on your desktop.
Run it, enter the server address, and let it work.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

And while it runs, I read the archive.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Exactly.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

You know… I’m starting to like working with you guys.




                  
                  Unknown  (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Careful.


People who say that usually end up in trouble.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:34:54) 
                  
                

Too late for that.

firstname: Unknown User

                  Unknown User  (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

You’ll be sorry…




                  
                  Unknown User  (2026-04-22 18:35:51) 
                  
                

Stop messing with that site. You are poking a hole you don’t want to end up in.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-22 18:35:51) 
                  
                

Who the fuck are you?




                  
                  Unknown User  (2026-04-22 18:35:51) 
                  
                

I am someone who can make your life real hard. And it wouldn’t even be much trouble.

Name yourself or fuck off.

my name is irrelevant. I work for people who want that site down for good. some things are NOT supposed to be made public

Chats/V3_News.title: Chat with V3 News
Chats/V3_News.content:
Chat with V3 News


firstname: V3
lastname: News
age: 0
sex: Male
registration: [REDACTED]
occupancy: REDACTED
rank: None
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Self employed

Messages


                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Archived message: La ferme des générations


News agent: Today we are present at the opening ceremony of a new Generational Farm with its CTO - Francis Drake. This farm is considered a beacon of hope for the population of nearby areas, especially larger cities, as the planned production rate is supposed to cover all the food needs with excess.
Francis, what could you tell us about this farm? Why is it special?
Francis: Hello and thank you for being with us today. For us at Astrocrop, this farm is not just a food source, but a way to open up Terra and its aspirations to humanity. We are trying to show that with our agricultural and bio technologies the old Earth can be truly restored.
The crops that we plan to produce here are supposed to cover the needs of several larger cities as well as the rural areas. No more hunger, no more survival. Cheap and abundant food for everyone!
News agent: Sounds great! But can you please tell us more about those technologies you are rumored to use? Are they safe?
Francis: Yes of course! We have been developing them for quite some time, passing several iterations! As you can see - our greenhouses are fully operational and ready to give people food! The technology is being researched with the help of the Core Tech, so it’s of the highest standard!
News agent: We have tried contacting Core about that and they had no comment for us. Do you know why?
Francis: Sadly, no. That is out of my knowledge, yet I can assure you that ALL of our technologies are safe and we have even started to produce some MRE sets for deep space exploration and long term transportation, and they look super promising …
(almost half a minute of sudden silence) - can you cut it please?
News agent: … Anyway, when can we expect the first batches of food to arrive in the local shops?
Francis: By the end of next month. I would also like to again specify that our products are completely safe to use and all of them have been extensively tested before start of use.
News agent: That is definitely great news!
We would like to thank our guest - Martian Generational Farm CTO Francis Drake for his time! This has been V3 NEWS and your host Gian Sullivan! Stick to the news, folks!

📄 News Photo



                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-21 09:24:03) 
                  
                

Archived message: 12 August, 2248: “LZ-15000”


Lunaz corporation has presented its new engine LZ-15000. The engine is specifically developed for use in their famous monorail trains that can reach a speed of 600+ km\h.
Due to the company technical specifications, the engine has been tested to be fully operational, passing the durability test.
The Lunaz representative - Ivan Kotelvov, has stated that the nearest train to implement that technology would be used on one of the ring stations that are being developed by several SOYUZ tech companies.
Although he refused to answer any other questions in regards to the project, the community was left intrigued on the details of the project. Our reporters would try to find additional information and present it to you. Stay with us!


                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-21 09:24:03) 
                  
                

Archived message: Sept 01, 2248. Red timber


A new line of wooden furniture has been presented at the “Solar exhibition” which took place at the Lunar “Art and Deco” art gallery.
The authors claim that the furniture is made out of Martian “tall trees” which have distinguished red and blue inclusions. The price of this furniture starts at millions of CORIE coins per set, hence the rarity of the products. Although the demand for the furniture sets is very high, some experts are hesitant to approve of that. One of those, Ludovica Fiolanty had following to say:
“I am 20 years in this business, and that is the first time I see something coming presumably from Mars. The planet is still struggling due to terraformation problems and the outgoing trade routes and non operational to my knowledge. Therefore the source of the material which the furniture is made of remains questionable, at least to me.”
Although several similar opinions have been said by other experts, the majority tends to believe that the products are authentic.


                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-21 09:24:03) 
                  
                

Feb 2 2251 - Act of Defiance


Today, we got reports of an ongoing riot on the “Flakes guest house” space station. Notorious for its special “Yammy flakes”, the station has been a main marketing hub for a Nutrimentum corporation. Sources on sight report that the riot started after one of the guests said something about the product “not being that good anymore”, which led to a fist fight between guests and personnel. Council patrol ship “Indomitus” has apparently been dispatched to quell the uprising.
We will keep monitoring the communication channels and update you on any further developments!


                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-21 09:24:03) 
                  
                

Mar 1., 2251 - Night at a museum


The Museum of Colonization has re-opened its doors on Luna, after an unfortunate event with the old “Aspirer” type rocket. The museum owner - Selena Farsight has the following to say:
“Our museum is dedicated to all aspects of colonization history. Sadly, this means dealing with older tech that, like in this instance, could be unstable and cause all sorts of problems. The rocket in question was transported here from one of the colonies in bad shape. During a technical evaluation the launch protocol was triggered, resulting in an explosion. Luckily only a few people got injured, and the incident ended without the loss of human life. For us this was a prime reminder of why our job is deemed dangerous.
With the re-opening of the museum we can reassure people that the security measures have been upgraded and that the safety of our guests is our top priority.”


                  
                  V3 News (2026-04-21 09:24:03) 
                  
                

Mar 15, 2251 - Graphics upgrade


A new type of videochips have been presented at the “Ultimate Reality show” which took place on the usual “RBG 24” asteroid station. At that show, a new NGTX 99890 TI video card was presented by one of the oldest chipmaker companies from Terra.
The video card was greeted with applause, as the usual expectations of a 25% power increase had been met without a big price increase. The company representative Tatiana Hangu stated that this was done due to some “old green magic” and promised a whole series of video cards in different form factors and for all possible budgets.
One of the visitors gave us a comment we would like to cite: ” This stuff is so cool! Finally I can play can play all my games on my home PC at 8k 250fps!“.
The CORIE OS already supports a new video card with the latest drivers and so far no problems have been reported. We are looking forward to getting our hands on the new products as well and will keep you posted!

Chats/Vladimir_Semakin.title: Chat with Vladimir Semakin
Chats/Vladimir_Semakin.content:
Chat with Vladimir Semakin


firstname: Vladimir
lastname: Semakin
age: 54
sex: Male
registration: No permanent registration
occupancy: Garbage Disposal Manager
rank: None
accountStatus: ACTIVE
company: Self employed

Messages


                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-19 17:33:10) 
                  
                

Funny guy…




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Hello. I have something for you. Please review these documents. They contain important information about a case I need your help with.



📄 43klhgherjkvhrbkjrvntlrkjhvlerkvre_preview.webp


📄 erbhjrekbhtrkjhckjehbkjrhvjkekbjrh_preview.png



                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Did you manage to crack the cipher? What did you find?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

I tracked down everyone mentioned in the file… but I still don’t understand what it all means.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Good. You have done your research. Now I can share the access code with you. Use it on the website to download the full investigation file.


CODE [535918]


                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Now you see why the data had to be transmitted that way. It was too dangerous, it could have been intercepted. I need your help. I need someone who can find the girl, or that monster. I know her parents, they are the good guys, and they need closure. Please, do whatever you can when you have time. I am just an old guy and I do not have much. But if you do that, I will find a way to repay you.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

I will try. I am in transit right now, but I will see what I can do. I will contact you when I find something.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

No… I will contact you myself, later. I will know…




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Hey. I have some questions that I hope you can answer.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

That is quite unexpected. Have you found Jean already?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Maybe, but that is not what I would like to ask now.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Okay, go on.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

You know, I have found some interesting information. Does “Technofreedom” ring a bell?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Where… how… huh! You are very resourceful. I guess my reaction gave myself up though. So, what would you like to know?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

It has been about 30 years ago, so I am just curious about who you really are, how you are involved with Jean and why did you contact me.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

So many questions. But it’s only fair since you would have discovered that anyways, sooner or later.
I work for an agency that is part of a bigger corporation. My job is to find prominent individuals and offer them a job in our organization.
It just so happened that I was busy wrapping up the loose ends involving Jean, but my plans were somewhat interrupted by a series of weird circumstances. So I became in need of a good investigator to find out how that could happen. And you came to my mind.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

But how do you know me in the first place?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Well, you have been working for us for quite some time, you know. Or let’s say, for one of our other agencies. History unfolded. Rings a bell, ha ha?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

What the? Really? Are they terrorists as well?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Terrorists? No. If you mean that old incident - the reports are fake. I will not go into details, maybe later, but in short, all that Technofreedom agenda was a cover up to acquire the AI prototype and replace it with something much simpler. Technically, the operation was a complete success. Unfortunately due to several system flaws the whole situation became a full shit show and instead of shutting down their system started acting. The AI was not there to prevent it (or make it worse) and the human operators simply did not know what to do. It was not our fault but nevertheless it burdens me even now.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

So whom are you working for, really?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Have you heard of Osiris corporation? I am one of its members, something close to a mix of special agent and an HR. It’s funny, really, how did I even get here, sometimes I wonder… But this gives me purpose.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

But I don’t get it, why did you guys tell me from the start? Why create all that charade?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Because we see a great potential in you, and because you are an interesting individual, so we had to come to know you better before opening like that. You should have learned the truth about us a bit later, but, like I said, you’ve got skills, so here we are.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

So what now?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Well, I still need you to find out about Jean, if you have not done it already. Her story might surprise you as well.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Some hidden agenda as well?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

No, just part of my job. It is a way to show what we can do for people we are interested in. And she was the one we were interested in very much, like you are.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

But who are you people, really? I have heard a lot of things about Osiris, but most of them were smoke and mirrors.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

That is the exact way of our operation. We do not show ourselves to the open public. Our goals and our means are not the common ones. We think that we know how all “this” works and want to make it better for everyone.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

I would need more than that. I would need much more. Information, goals, means - I want to know everything.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

That is most admirable, but that would have to wait until you talk to your handler next time. When you reach Mars. Either me or She would debrief you properly. Now is not the time.
Also, a question - how did you find information about me?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Jack gave me a hint.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Oh, so you contacted him as well. You continue to surprise. But please be very careful with him, he is a ghost, even to us, and is probably a very dangerous person.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

He said the same thing about you.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Well yes, we recognized each other when we met near that launch site. Let’s say, at some point we worked for the competing organizations and are probably still doing that.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Whom is he working for?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

I do not know exactly. With his skills my bet would be on something CORE-related, maybe even CIS or something similar, but aside from that I do not know. The fact that he was able to hint you like that speaks for itself. He has information. So, please, be very careful if you continue talking to him. What did he want from you, actually?




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Same as you, find Jean and make sure she is ok. He said he was sentimental about her. Got attached or something.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Yes, she is something… okay then. Let’s speak after you find out everything about her.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Why is that so important? Who is she to you?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Find her and you will know. Contact me after that. And be careful. Good luck.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Everyone likes to wish me luck nowadays. Okay, I will contact you later.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

One more thing before you go.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

So, that was a surprise. How… why? I am confused. If you knew it all the time, what was the point of all that?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Well, consider this as an introduction and an invitation. Now you know whom you are working for and what we are capable of doing.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Manipulating an unstable girl into breaking up with her family and doing espionage?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

It was not us. Well, not totally. Our goal was to recruit her into our ranks, as she was showing great potential. And as you now know - she fitted just fine. What happened though was an unfortunate “side effect” from exposure to the 3rd party, Jake. He interfered, playing his own agenda and basically ruining the plan. We did not know that he was working for someone else, he was supposed to be one of our “partner” groups inside agents.


I could even say that we got lucky with this outcome… but who knows, maybe it is fate after all.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Your actions are questionable at best. By any standards. Yet you want to invite me to your cause. Are you sure you are a good HR?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

You are being too dramatic. It worked out well for everyone. Jean got her freedom and a cause to live for, her father got rid of a potential leak. Jake… I guess he got something out of it as well. The only poor soul in all that is Jean’s mother, but Jean is not prohibited from contacting her, so not doing that is her own choice.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

This logic of yours… are you guys all like that?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

There is no black and white in our universe. All decisions have consequences and are affecting someone. For example, if you think that your investigations had no aftermath… let’s say you are incorrect. But that would be up for later discussion. Meanwhile, we just want you to prepare for what’s coming next. We need to understand your motives and propose something bigger than just curiosity for you to work for.


You will be arriving on Mars soon, and we had to make sure that you would know and accept the reality.
Like I said, I do not want to tell you more than I should, as you would have to speak to your handler, Aurana, regardless. And, as I have told you, you overreached our expectations.


                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

In regards of Aurana - where did that come from?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

That is a story that only She will tell you. If she decided to do it. I guess you will have to gain her trust for that.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Okay, but what now?




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Now you have time to think and make decisions. I… we want you to understand that we need your help, but we require loyalty. We know that you have been in contact with different people and groups, and got yourself both new enemies and friends alike. Consider them as your resources after you land on the station. How to use them, or what to do with them would be entirely up to you. We will provide you with the missions, but the choice is always yours.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

You guys really like the suspense.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Part of the job. You will get used to it.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

All right. I still have some things to do… I guess I will be waiting for a contact from you when I get to the station.




                  
                  Vladimir Semakin (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Indeed. Aurana will contact and debrief you. And, by the way, there is no more Jean. Only Aurana.




                  
                  Me (2026-04-21 18:34:59) 
                  
                

Understood. Until next time then. Good luck to you too…

Codex/Companies_Factions/Astrocrop.title: Astrocrop
Codex/Companies_Factions/Astrocrop.content:
Astrocrop

An agrotechnical company from Terra that provides complete solutions for growing crops, including specialized machinery and gene modifications.
One of the few agro-monopolists in the solar system.

Codex/Companies_Factions/CADL.title: CADL
Codex/Companies_Factions/CADL.content:
CADL

A CORE administrative branch, mostly dedicated to bureaucracy, but is also responsible for faction diplomacy.

Codex/Companies_Factions/CCS.title: CCS
Codex/Companies_Factions/CCS.content:
CCS

Core Colonial Structure - a branch responsible for early colonization efforts on all humanity’s colonies. They are the people who come in first (usually) and prepare the infrastructure. True heroes of humanity.

Codex/Companies_Factions/CORE-Arms.title: CORE Arms
Codex/Companies_Factions/CORE-Arms.content:
CORE Arms

CORE Arms - A military technology research and development branch for the CORE. They are the ones that produce all those “cool” sci-fi guns and equipment that we all love. Core Arms mostly use the technologies provided by CORE Tech.

Codex/Companies_Factions/CORE-Tech.title: Core Tech
Codex/Companies_Factions/CORE-Tech.content:
CORE Tech

CORE Tech - the holders of secrets. They obtain, develop and distribute most of the technologies that humanity has as a whole. They also function as a controller for products that are manufactured using said technologies (if those are deemed important or potentially dangerous).

Codex/Companies_Factions/Exar-Solis.title: Exar Solis
Codex/Companies_Factions/Exar-Solis.content:
Exar-Solis

An old energy company that originates from Terra (formerly Earth), that specializes on all sorts of power generation.
A founding member and an executor corporation of the USOL faction.

Codex/Companies_Factions/Lerp-Express.title: Lerp Express
Codex/Companies_Factions/Lerp-Express.content:
Lerp Express

A famous SOYUZ railroad company with extensive pre-colonization era history. Nowadays they produce almost all of the railroad and monorail solutions throughout the solar system.
They are well known for the excellent quality of their products.

Codex/Companies_Factions/Paradigm.title: Paradigm
Codex/Companies_Factions/Paradigm.content:
Paradigm Logistics

Paradigm Logistics - an interspace logistics company. They ship everything everywhere. Colonies, asteroids, stations - you name it.
“No questions asked” policy is usually included.
Officially - a USOL affiliated company but rumor has it that they are “friends” with Osiris.

Codex/Companies_Factions/Private-Club-PM.title: Private Club
Codex/Companies_Factions/Private-Club-PM.content:
Private Club PMC

Private Club PMC is a notorious company that provides their services to the most wealthy clients. Known for their VIP protection services, the company is led by Magnus “Zar” Hartmann and Torvald “Sohn” Hartmann (father and son).

Codex/Companies_Factions/SOYUZ.title: Soyuz
Codex/Companies_Factions/SOYUZ.content:
SOYUZ

One of the Major factions in the Solar System. Found on the principles of communion and combined effort, they aim to find a new permanent home for humanity. Space pioneers, colonizators and space station builders - everything in hopes of breaching the Solar System borders and finding new home.

Codex/Companies_Factions/Starprom.title: Starprom Industries
Codex/Companies_Factions/Starprom.content:
Starprom Industries

A backbone of the SOYUZ faction. A major manufacturer of “everything”. Metal works, composites, space construction, machinery - you name it. They produce it all, large and small.

Codex/Companies_Factions/Stroika-Develop.title: Stroika Development
Codex/Companies_Factions/Stroika-Develop.content:
Stroika Development

Biggest SOYUZ civilian developer and reconstruction service provider.
THEY BUILD. Like that.
Any building of SOYUZ design you find anywhere - chances are they built it.

Codex/Companies_Factions/USOL.title: USOL
Codex/Companies_Factions/USOL.content:
USOL

One of the major factions in the Solar System.
Based on the principles of freedom (in everything) they have embraced the “survival of the fittest” attitude in all of their ways. Driven by internal competition, as well as being united by common “outer” adversaries (SOYUZ and Terra Mater) they rely mostly on their space stations and asteroid bases, rather than colonies. Their plan is to utilize the Solar System to its limits without thinking of the distant future, and they are very good at exploiting that idea.



CDC

USOL 6th support fleet

Codex/Companies_Factions/ViiBOT.title: Viibot
Codex/Companies_Factions/ViiBOT.content:
ViiBOT Automation

ViiBOT Automation is a company that specializes in everything drone-related (mostly aerial, but not limited to). They utilize DTJC technology, provided by CORE Tech to create top of the line drone and android solutions.

Codex/Entry-1/Artemis_Incident_Summary.title: Artemis Incident Summary
Codex/Entry-1/Artemis_Incident_Summary.content:
Artemis Incident Summary
Weapons Program
WEAPON EXPERIMENTS (railgun, miner outpost)
A live weapon test has been performed on a freshly developed “LRMD” (long range matter disintegrator) by CORE Arms. The spokesman Thomas Albertson had the following to say: “After a series of unfortunate setbacks we are finally ready to present a new weapon system for the Council navy. Its implication in future ship designs intimidates any pirate or criminal that would think about raiding. CORE Arms is still adamant on offering only the best solutions to those who fight for humanity”.
Although such a statement could be considered vague at best, rumor has it that each of the major factions are already lining up to acquire the new weapon, before the “intended” buyer.
Our investigators were able to uncover information that these so-called “LRMDs” are a result of the continuation of “Project Artemis” that notoriously failed about 4 decades ago, leading to catastrophic destruction on several test sites. Most information about the events of those years are still kept secret from the general public, but with the re-surfacing of that project we will try to keep you updated. Stay tuned!
Failure Pattern
Taken together, the records suggest catastrophic site damage, missing oversight and a deliberate effort to preserve the technology despite prior disaster. Artemis was not buried because it was impossible. It was buried because it was dangerous, politically inconvenient and still valuable enough for someone to keep reviving.

Codex/Entry-1/Biofarm-Revision-Transcrip.title: Biofarm Revision Transcript — Generational Farm Meeting
Codex/Entry-1/Biofarm-Revision-Transcrip.content:
Biofarm Revision Transcript — Generational Farm Meeting


title: BIOFARM REVISION - Meeting Protocol
author: Transcript
date: FEB 15 2183

BIOFARM REVISION
MEETING PROTOCOL 12.45.16
FEB 15 2183

Generational Farm
[REDACTED]
ATTENDING
Alio Corvin
Astrocrop planetary manager
Silvia Shepherd
Astrocrop planetary manager
Farhad Somrei
Farm chief botanist engineer
[REDACTED]
CORE Biotech representative
Samantha [REDACTED]
CORE Tech scientific supervisor, Zvezdochka Lab Complex

RECORDING TRANSCRIPT
Alio Corvin

As I was saying, our farm would be fully operational this year. The minor setbacks that we have experienced in the past did not affect us much, aside from small inconveniences. Our personnel are trained and ready, and if esteemed CORE representatives can assure us of security being upgraded we can start production really soon.

[REDACTED]

As you well know, it is not our prerogative, as CORE Biotech, to provide security. We do have unmanned units at our disposal but with the evolving situation in the region it would be unwise to relocate them from our objects to yours. Even if it’s THAT important.

Silvia Shepherd

But what about the CMU ? The security forces that you had patrolling the area ? Can you spare a squad or two ? With their equipment they would be able to overpower any threat that attempts to come here.

[REDACTED]

sigh Those are not OUR personnel. We do not control them either. The orders come from high above. If THEY decide that it has to be done - we will accept the decision. If you want my opinion - it looks like they think that the Magnetic Center is a greater priority than this project.
But anyways, we are here for a report about your progress with the plants. Anything to report ?

Farhad Somrei

Yes sir, we have received the specimen that you sent to us. Thanks to Miss Samantha here we were able to plant and nourish them in our soil. The results are promising. We estimate this plant to be able to feed not only the Mariner City but half of the planet as well. Maybe even more. But what confuses me … I have never seen a cellular structure like that. Has it been altered ?

Samantha

This information is classified. We made an agreement that you would test our plants without asking questions in exchange for new biotech research becoming available to your government back on Terra. Let’s stick to that. We have fully kept our part of the deal, and you already reap the benefits. The delays here are … unsatisfactory, at least.

Alio Corvin

We will fix it … we will hire locals if needed. We would need to test those foods on someone anyway … if only our Dossiers could feel more safe …

[REDACTED]

Enough. I am growing tired of your whining. Your concerns will be reported to the CADL. They will deal with it. But keep it all to yourselves. We do not want any attention from the Council; it’s a complicated enough matter already.

Samantha

We will keep in touch with you. Proceed with the plan. Those damn plants could either save us all or doom humanity. Do not fuck up.

Codex/Entry-1/Biotech-Experiment-1702-Sp.title: Biotech Experiment 1702 — Specimen Autopsy Report
Codex/Entry-1/Biotech-Experiment-1702-Sp.content:
Biotech Experiment 1702 — Specimen Autopsy Report


title: Experiment 1702, L/A
author: Konrad Malloy
date: July 2240

EXPERIMENT 1702 - Specimen Autopsy Report
Experiment 1702, L/A
CORE Biotech,
Specimen Autopsy.
July 2240.
Location: [REDACTED]
BIOTECH
//
JULY 2240     L/A
//
Senior researcher
Konrad Malloy
has produced an autopsy on a specimen found at the -
REDACTED]
about 500 meters from the center. The first visual examination of the specimen suggested that it had been a monkey-like animal that somehow got delivered to the planet and died of natural causes, as no obvious signs of external damage were visible.
However, after the x-ray, m mapping of the body and full genetic scans were performed, the results showed “him” to be an adult human, roughly of the age of 50 years. The inside organs have been shifted and somewhat scrambled. The muscular system was all twisted and greatly enlarged and the brain tissue was only 20% of the normal size.
The radiation coming from the body was spiking at the nerve junctions and all equipment that could be affected by the resonance was producing quiet “humming” sounds while in a radius of 1 meter from the body.
Doctor Malloy requested additional resources and equipment from the main facility to further his research on the matter. His preliminary conclusion was that the specimen was one of the first colonists that somehow got trapped in the area quite some time ago and was affected by different local emanations and biological conditions. He advised that the case would be given a “level 7 S” status thus restricting access to all documents.

title: Project “Dementer” - Message to Investors
author: Dr Alio Corvin
date: 07.07.2182

ASTROCROP
Project “Dementer”
PRESENTED BY:
Astrocrop.
Dr Alio Covin,
07.07.2182, message to investors

Project Demeter is something that we, in AstroCorp, are proud of. The substance that we have created, with the help of CORE Tech, relies on our research aimed at restoration of planet Earth, or Terra, as they call it nowadays.
We hope that the invention of this substance will open doors for any and all terraforming projects that were considered too dangerous.
Today, we are ready to proudly present to you one of the results of the “Demeter” project - a Synthetic brassinosteroids Biostimulant, Version 4, or as we call it - SBS4.
This substance is a biologically active compound aimed at increasing the growth rate of plants. The crops that have that compound applied to them show at least 84% growth rate increase.
SBS4 is considered non-invasive and safe to use on any type of crops, proven by extensive research.
Our biochemical division is eager to start the next phase of testing - on live animals. We think that feeding animals food containing our compound will increase their growth rates as well, or prolong their life span.
Although these hypotheses are yet to be proven practically, we expect that the potential benefits from this technology could include the increase of life expectancy for Humans as well. Needless to say, such experiments are not planned yet, and could only happen after several years of thorough pre-testing and approval from authorities.
Meanwhile, we are developing a vitamin solution that would include a dose of SBS4 to test on animals and make available soon for distribution to our partners all around the Solar System.
Please feel free to fill the “distribution priority” form to get in line for the first shipments !
