title: ViiBOT ASSESSMENT CT1702
author: Simon Webb
date: Unknown


ViiBOT
ASSESSMENT CT1702
[REDACTED] COUPLINGS TEST
LEAD INVESTIGATOR: SIMON WEBB

LEAD INVESTIGATOR:
We have received a fresh batch of new [couplings], the ones that CORE Tech
[intended] to be used in “unmanned bipedal units”. Our task would be to test
them [on ex]isting models before proceeding with making th[em]
[… available for upc]oming proj[ect]s.
Although I have no reason to be cautious …
[o]f [course], these [couplings] look somewhat different and …
[… ] We would have to run extensive tests on them, t[hou\gh
[… … …] that would prohib[it] [their] use.
[… The equip]ment container that thos[e] [… exp]ensive
delivery [came in had the na]me of th[e] SOYUZ testing sites. Was that a mistake ?
= Test 1: S[train] rate [test] resul[ts show]
[exce]ssive degrad[ati]on
= Test 2: Angular [stra]in stress test - resu[lts] … [fai]l.
= Test 3: E[lect]rical compatibility - results show severe degradation in whole
system operation. Reason unknown.
= Test 4: [En]vironm[e]nt[al] resistance - test show extended resistance to
[… …]
= Test 5: [Magn]etic properties - inconsistent results.
The results of these tests could be described as magic. [I] know it’s not a
[scientific] way to say, but I have never seen a material like that. Starting
from its color to the point of interaction with other “regular” systems.
We were not able to determine the magnetic properties of those couplings at
all - our equipment shows impossible results, like that’s a material from a
star.
Wh[ich brings us to] the next problem - compatibility. Bot “health” systems can not
properly determine the status of those couplings, therefore a “critical
damage” status lights up, shutting the whole s[ys]tem down.
Besides, our techs say that it does something to an electrical grid as well,
even if it’s insulated.
All things conside[red] … [th]ose coupli[ngs] were not
[made for any] type of dro[ne]. [ …] I am no expert but it’s pr[obably a weapon of]
some sort. I will contact the higher ups t[o] proce[ed with an investiga]tion and
[… …] . Meanwhile all our personnel were
told to keep quiet about it. We do not want some international “incident” or
SOYUZ troops [involved].
= SIMON WEBB
[Signature]

Codex/Entry-1/Dialogue-with-Aurana.title: Dialogue with Aurana
Codex/Entry-1/Dialogue-with-Aurana.content:
Dialogue with Aurana
Aurana 1
Hello. My name is Aurana Strogova, I will be your handler for the duration of the Contract. First of all, please remind yourself of the terms and conditions written in it, we consider it crucial that you follow those closely. Your task is to uncover some secrets that we find … intriguing. We have several files in our possession that our intelligence service was able to acquire. Most of them are scans and photos. These files are not in the best condition, but, trust me, it took a lot of effort to get them. Each of the files contain some information that may or may not be useful in your investigation. But they all provide some context to the events that we are interested in.
We believe that things that are happening right now, the ones that you may have heard from the news, are somehow connected to those documents. Your main goal in this investigation would be the uncovering of such connections. I fully understand the “vagueness” of the task but consider it a test of your abilities and a tribute to the secrecy we operate in.
We, in turn, would provide you with several tools that you might find handy, but feel free to use any open source intelligence that you can find.

Aurana 2
Additionally, please note that your FREEL ID will be required to access the majority of the information we will be providing to you.

Aurana 3
Finally, Good work on getting all the information. You have passed the test. Some may say it was not an easy one … not that i agree with that, but my client is pleased with your progress.
The point here is - we suspect that all those experiments and events of the past affect our current reality. By how much ? We do not know. And it is up to you to find out.
My client is confident that you would be able to handle this quest. But be cautious. There are people that would kill for the information you have now. The deeper you go the harder and more dangerous it will get. Failure is not an option.
Now, we are working on obtaining additional information on the matter, and I will share it with you as I get it. The only problem is - it’s random. We do not know what and when we will get from our sources. So be ready for everything.
One last thing. My client thinks that it’s not a single location described in all those files, there could be several. So if you find something - try to uncover that too. Won’t hurt and might give us additional angle for the main thing.

Codex/Entry-1/IWT-Use-Case.title: IWT Use Case
Codex/Entry-1/IWT-Use-Case.content:
IWT Use Case


title: IWT USE CASE
author: [REDACTED] Foul
date: August 2172

COR3 IWT
IWT USE CASE
Experiment results - 195.2
August 2172
Author: [REDACTED] Foul,
Ring 5
CORE Tech
Magnus Vervortessen
CORE Tech
Inventor, Ring 4.

Recent field tests show that IWT tech can be used in advanced awareness systems. Combined with NIC power cells, any IWT emitter can serve as a miniature radar, drawing a picture of a person with detailed precision. This technology has massive military potential.
Technically, all radio waves of specific wavelengths can be used in the same way, but IWT tech amplifies them, increasing signal range and clarity.
Basically, what that means is that CORE Tech operators, equipped with specific emitters and receivers can manipulate all nearby equipment with IWT technology to emit radio waves that would create a 3D map of obstacles and refract the waves back to the listening device. This could happen with only a slight delay, almost in real time.
This means that the opposing forces would find no hiding spot, and only hard-shielded buildings or vehicles could offer protection.
Our CORE Arms technicians are working on the ways to implement that knowledge into the portable multi tool prototypes. At the same time, our comrades from CORE Tech are trying to create a defensive solution for the problem, as they think that it will only be a matter of time before someone from the major factions comes to a similar solution. For now, we propose to secure this information as much as possible, and lower potential emitting power of all devices using IWT, claiming either manufacturing flaws or “crystal degradation”. We need to keep this in check, at least for now.

Codex/Entry-1/Investigation-Notes.title: Investigation Notes
Codex/Entry-1/Investigation-Notes.content:
Investigation Notes
Next Steps
Saw Aurana Strogova|Aurana’s message. She was extra nice today. Not the usual full “ice cold” attitude. Maybe I am doing fine after all.
I feel like I am really close to something. The main problem I have is figuring out the locations of all the objects I found information about. They could be anywhere but somehow I feel like it’s all in one place. Maybe looking through various Archival sites would make sense to help correlate things …
To sum things up:
First, we have smuggled couplings that were brought to a secret complex on a random planet. That does not give me much, but the fact that it got there by accident means it may be worth it to try and find the name of the ship that was used for transportation. That could, at least, lead me to its flight path records, so I can work from there.
Next thing we have is some sort of a fucked up compound that someone decided to add to the foods and test on people. It looks like it has been spread out enough to cause “accidents” all around the solar system. Or at least that USED to be the case.
It seems that shit has been distributed by CDEA, or some thugs posing as them. A potential false flag operation maybe ? Might be worth checking that lead, but it would be dangerous as hell …
Another option is to try and find that old “Brother” that was mentioned in one of the documents … What was his name ? I need to remind myself. Considering he’s still alive and I can find him.
After that, there was something about an ongoing LRMD stuff. Something about railguns and “project Artemis”. That brings some memories. I have definitely heard that name before. But I would need someone to talk about it. That guy, a salesman … might try my luck with him. I doubt that he knows much but he might slip up some details.
And finally, a Sky Lift. I can name at least 3 that have been built on colonies and even bigger asteroids, but considering the context - it’s likely located on a planet. The question is - which one. Might have to re-view what I have on that one. At least PCF is mentioned several times throughout the documents, but some Cult as well. PCF, some freedom fighters if i’m right. Or, might as well check the USOL officers mentioned in the document. Not sure if they are alive or not, but their records, should they be open, could tell me something.
Lots of work to do, I’d better start off now.
New Lead Identified
Some interesting shit here. That REPNODE is one of the REPENT deployment facilities. They usually belong to CEDRT, and I know only of one active emergency zone - Mars. Meaning that’s the station on its orbit. And that facility … a missile silo or something else ?
I would have to keep looking into this, but for now i’v got what i was looking for. Need to check other leads, starting with that “Brother”.
Seamus J. Malkob, his account shows as active. 95 years old, thought … How is he even alive with a bounty on his head ?
I need to try contacting him using encryption software. Maybe that would make him feel safe enough to answer.
Something Is Very Wrong
Holy shit, those guys are insane. I knew Terrans were “special” in so many ways, but this … If I am right, they have decided to test an actual bio weapon on humans. No doubt that they thought of it as some magical serum or something. Fucking bastards.
The only question is where that stuff is produced, and what products might have been affected.
I need to check the news channels, maybe someone wrote about something similar.
Mars Again
Another lead, and once again it’s Mars. That place keeps its secrets tight. I need to keep looking, there are yet few things that I can still chase down.

title: Magnetism - Experiment results 195.2
author: [REDACTED] Foul
date: August 2172

COR3
Magnetism
Experiment results - 195.2
August 2172
Author: [REDACTED] Foul,
Ring 5,
CORE Tech
BIOTECH
//
JULY 2240
//
All samples taken from the target site have been tested using all available equipment.
The spectrometer shows a substantial amount of gamma rays on ALL samples.
At the same time there is no indication of any radiation.
That contradicts with all tests that have been procured with samples taken from a previous site, located just 300 meters south from the Locations/target location.
There can be no scientific explanation to this phenomenon.
Our brothers from Ring 7 mentioned something like an “origin site” that I have no knowledge of, but aside from that, no useful information has been shared.
Our team will continue exploration of the target area and comparing results from other sites located nearby. We hope to find some or any similarities at least.
I would also request assistance from other rings as well as a dedicated energy field specialist team from Magnetic Center, as this situation bothers us a lot.

Codex/Entry-1/Mars-Lead-Summary.title: Mars Lead Summary
Codex/Entry-1/Mars-Lead-Summary.content:
Mars Lead Summary
By the end of the first investigation package, multiple independent threads point to Mars. The REPNODE station, the Generational Farm, the Gobbler weapons site and the Sky Lift materials all orbit the same sphere of activity. The pattern is no longer a coincidence: whatever connected the old experiments, military failures and industrial anomalies appears to have touched Martian infrastructure repeatedly.

Codex/Entry-1/Operation-Tripe.title: Operation Tripe
Codex/Entry-1/Operation-Tripe.content:
Operation Tripe


title: COR3 OPERATION “TRIPE”
author: Multiple
date: 2191

COR3 OPERATION “TRIPE”
TOP SECRET

Communication log transcript, [REDACTED] - 2191. ISC comm intercept, log 7691.


They are withdrawing. The whole planet, they are abandoning it.


What did you expect from them ? Greed and incompetence, that is their doom.


I do not care about them, you know. I need to think about our assets and research. We have too many objects in that area that are not yet evacuated. We need to ensure the safety of those and their contents.


You worry too much. Steps have already been taken. Our CUU’s have been deployed several days ago. They are taking control over all of our major complexes. Others would be sealed off.


But what about the remaining personnel ? We still have people on the ground.


Non essential. We will get them out if we can. But if not … such would be the price for knowledge. The Algorithm predicted that and approved.


Since when did we start to trust that machine blindly ?


Since the day the Overseers said so. We can not question their will.


You, Farwin Duct, are a hypocrite, as you are an Overseer as well.


Such is my way, and I am not proud of it. But I will do everything in my power to get us closer to the ultimate understanding, no matter the cost or sacrifice.


COMMUNICATION LOG END.

CMU Unit “Delta 12”, Galahad Johnston, Ring 1, Conjurer. Personal log, 52.
This deployment is a great honor for me. We are here to secure the knowledge that was gained at that location. All those complexes and data vaults are sacred. We must make sure that those remain untouched.
As I write this, our teams are reaching all the complexes that we can reach in time. We have just a few days, if not less, to secure everything until those filthy animals from [REDACTED] would tear it all apart. And as for those USOL cowards … their punishment for such a failure would be severe, no doubt. But that would come later.
My personal task is to make sure that our sacred energy transfer corridor is properly shut down, as otherwise the whole planet may be destroyed by its immense power.
We are embarking on a journey towards the great Sky Arch, to switch off the secondary terminal, while the CMU “Omega 56” with our comrades from the technical division would work on the primary terminal at -[REDACTED]- center.
Let the holy knowledge help us in our task and let the Algorithm guide us.
LOG END.

EMCOM Transmission 3718, ISC comm intercept decoding. Section 13, crisis team.


Reached the [REDACTED] center. The facility looks mostly intact but with traces of invasion attempts. Personnel is not present at the site. Automated defence systems partially disabled.


Outer perimeter breach confirmed, 5 entry points detected. Opposition unknown. Found bodies, unmarked equipment. No designations found. Human. ID unsuccessful. Proceeding further.


Inner perimeter looks intact. Breach attempts location found, more bodies. Automated systems repelled invaders. Entering the main complex.


Main complex secured, no breach detected. Automated defences in hibernation mode, trying to reboot. Reboot time - 30 minutes. Proceeding to the control room.


Control room reached, engineering team initiating remote shutdown of sister facilities.


T***y are mad ! AI gone rogue ! **** down all systems now ! Barricade the doors !


Reactor building up power ! Re-route it to the secondary power bridge !


Can we stop it ? No ? Did the re-route work ? Evacuate immediately !


It’s launching a shutdown pulse. Everyone BRACE.


****** REPORTING: REACTOR SHUT DOWN, ENERGY DISCHARGE ROUTED THROUGH A SECONDARY LOOP, DAMPER INOPERABLE ! EVACUATING NOW !
**** OF CASUALTIES ! BACKLASH ****** PULSE ! REQUESTING IMMEDIATE EXTRACTION !

Codex/Entry-1/Personal-Log.title: Personal Log
Codex/Entry-1/Personal-Log.content:
Personal Log
Personal Log
17.05.2251
Today is my first day as a private investigator for “History Unfolded”.
The contract has been signed and all the terms agreed for. But I am still shocked about how smooth that went. Those people … the “handler” - they didn’t even ask that many questions. It seemed like they knew me for quite some time. And that Aurana Strogova|Aurana chick … stunning but dangerous. She gives me chills.
How did I even get here … have been asking that myself for several days now. Guess wanting something new and mysterious can sometimes lead to such adventures.
The main goal of that “contract” is to uncover some old mysteries it seems. But I wonder if those are truly a secret for the people who hired me, because they seem to be very well informed. Like having deep knowledge on most events.
Maybe they are looking for an alternative opinion, or maybe they found something interesting in my personality and skill set … Honestly, I am not sure I would even like to know.
For me this is an opportunity to show myself. This “PI” stuff thrills me. Besides, from a rough description of events that I would be looking at, it seems that those are the pretty big ones. I wonder why I have not heard about them before.
After all, the Handler said that “they think it’s all connected”, a classical conspiracy theory that looks too good to be true. I honestly would have not believed anything she said, if not for her look. She did not look like a crazy person but rather a cold and dedicated one. Ex-military i would say, if not something more serious.
But all things considered, I have no clue whom I am working for. That company is just a shell, that much is obvious, but who they really are … should I even care ?
After all, that contract came through an CORIE job center, so it’s official and approved. That’s some reassurance at least.
I need to stay sharp though, as this is my first time working with those people and I honestly start to think that it all might be just a test of my skills.
I’ve shared some thoughts with a few of my old friends from the “good ol days” and they all said that I probably should not do it. Well, got nothing better to do, so why not.
The only thing that really concerns me is the contract - it is too vague and even the money that they told me about is not stated. That is really weird. Let’s hope those guys will keep their word on all the terms and conditions we spoke about. Somehow I believe they will.
Maybe this is finally something I was looking for, and maybe that contract will change my life for the better … for once.

Codex/Entry-1/Prion-Neutralization.content:
Prion Neutralization

title: Prion Neutralization - Personal Note 71
author: Doctor A Corvin

ASTROCROP
Prion Neutralization
PRESENTED BY:
Biochemical division.
Alio Corvin|Doctor A Corvin,
personal note 71

“The experiments that we have made have finally paid off. We were able to block those negative effects of the modifier PrPs. Finally, after years of experiments it happened.
But we could say it’s only because of the data we have received from CORE Tech and their “advanced experimental site”.
We have sent them about 50 samples of the mammal tissue, and not only that … but just 5 were returned back, along with the data.
They claim that the solution they are providing would cure every protein-related disease in human history. I am hesitant to trust that, but maybe …
The other side of the coin means that basically ALL mammal meat could potentially be used in meals. And I mean ALL.
I guess one can say it’s a good thing, especially for the colonies struck with famine and relying only on external supply chains … but still, this could lead to severe ethical problems. And I would prefer to not be a part of any of that at all.
This means that I will be turning my in research to the higher ups, and after that … it’s not my business any more.
Let the Lord have mercy on our souls.”

Codex/Entry-1/Project-Artemis.content:
Project Artemis

Project Artemis


Type: IMAGE
Last Seen: 04-24 20:34:52



title: Project Artemis - Informational Brief
author: Unknown
date: Unknown
reference_url: image_41e576.jpg

COR3
PROJECT: ARTEMIS
TOP SECRET
Informational brief, eyes only

Project Artemis was founded during the 2150’s as a matter of controlling the freshly found colonies. Disguised as an “asteroid defence” program, it implied the deployment of missile platforms on the orbit of colonized planets and big enough space bodies (colonizable asteroids or even big enough space stations).
The deployment process was rather slow, due to encountering many setbacks because of inefficiency of missile technology in those circumstances.
At the same time, advances in the NIC energy storage technology allowed CORE Arms to propose the development of railguns, both suitable for space ships and orbital platforms.
The development started in the late 2160’s with the construction of several r’n’d and test sites on Terra, Luna and Mars (and also several smaller ones located on asteroids and space stations).
Although initially those sites shared information about their process, it was later decided that such communications would be closed because of a possibility of data leak. After that all of the research complexes became fully autonomous.
The main objective of all of those sites was to find the most durable materials for both the cannons and ammunition.
The early prototypes that used standard “terran” materials seemed to not be durable enough, as the prototype cannons were usually limited to a few dozen shots before critical barrel damage.
The ammunition used, mainly consisting of Tungsten alloy, seemed to be fine for most use cases, but was somewhat struggling with atmospheric entry.
During the operating period, several research centers have been lost due to failed experiments, pirate raids and terrorist attacks as well as general shut downs due to lack of results.
Considering that, Project Artemis was mothballed in the early 2210’s, with all data moving to archives.
The project was deemed obsolete later, due to CORE’s paradigm shift towards economic and technological control over direct military intervention.
Recently, the project has been revived due to resurfacing of the information from the [REDACTED] complex, which was considered lost during the 2180’s.
The LRMD is a direct descendant from the Artemis project, yet its goal is to provide Council space ships with superior weapons capable of scaring off pirates, pillaging the inter-system stable trade routes.

Codex/Entry-1/Report-E.title: Report E
Codex/Entry-1/Report-E.content:
Report E


title: REPORT-E - Protected Witness Interrogation Transcript
author: USOL CDC
date: FEB 12. 2192

REPORT-E
PROTECTED WITNESS INTERROGATION TRANSCRIPT
INTERROGATING OFFICER: [REDACTED], CDC

0 Date
FEB 12. 2192
1 Officer
We know that you have been there, so we need your perspective on what happened. If you cooperate, we will upgrade your living conditions, drastically.
If you refuse though … you are under witness protection but who knows what can happen …
2 [REDACTED]
You can’t do shit. I know my rights and I know what I’ve signed for. Go fuck yourself dick.
3 Officer
Huh, I like that attitude. But, I guess you already know that we have found your wife, ex-girlfriend or whatever she is for you. I personally don’t care what happens to her, but the people you fucked with to get here do. So fucking speak.
4 [REDACTED]
You are a piece of shit. You and your whole team of scumbags. I will find a way to make you pay for it.
5 Officer
Sure mate, sure. But it will be later. For now you are just testing my patience. And it’s already THAT thin.
6 [REDACTED]
Allright … I do not know what the original plan was. Those fuckers from PCF led the show. Or the cultists did, I do not know. We were told to go there and wait for something. It was not supposed to be violent …
7 Officer
Cut the crap, we have found weapons on site. Who brought them ?
8 [REDACTED]
Not us. Me and my guys had nothing but banners.
9 Officer
Yeah, on a fucking steel pipes with spikes
10 [REDACTED]
We took what we had … but for real, we were told not to aggress.
11 Officer
Then who the fuck started to shoot ?
12 [REDACTED]
Your guys did. At least I think so. But it was weird, I think the shots came from somewhere above us. The cops in front of us did not shoot, they tried to negotiate. They were armed though.
13 Officer
Armed ? Are you telling me the negotiation squad was armed ? Stop fucking around
14 [REDACTED]
I swear man ! They had hand guns. But no one used them. And I think several of those guys were taken to our leaders before all that crazy shit started.
15 Officer
What did you do after the shots were fired
16 [REDACTED]
Took my ass and ran away. I am no fool, I knew where it was going. Most of my guys did as well.
17 Officer
Then who stormed the Skylift ? Did you see who ordered the push forward ? Did you hear anything ?
18 [REDACTED]
I dont want to lie man, I didnt. But as we ran we saw people that were walking towards the Skylift, their eyes were empty. Like fucking zombies. I think they were drugged or something.
19 Officer
You are not making it easier for me … think ! What else can you remember ?
20 [REDACTED]
The last thing i remember of that day is when we were running away, then all our hair electrified and we bumped into some sort of a force field surrounding the area. Then we all blacked out. or so I was told.
21 Officer
Okay … can’t say you were helpful but it is what it is. Go back to your little home and stay in touch. We will contact you if needed.
22 [REDACTED]
What about my wife ? I need you to promise she will be okay.
23 Officer
She thinks you are dead, let’s keep it that way. And if you behave we will make sure no one knows about her, including those guys that were looking for you.
24 [REDACTED]
But …
25 Officer
Enough. Sergeant, take him away.
26 Note
Additional note: Officer [REDACTED]
This witness said almost the same thing as the others, word for word. Either they all tell the truth or they all lie. We need to procure additional interrogations of remaining suspects. Possibly with more … intense methods.

Codex/Entry-1/Report-Z.title: Report Z
Codex/Entry-1/Report-Z.content:
Report Z


title: REPORT. 2.5815 - Interrogation Transcript
author: USOL CDC
date: FEB 14. 2192

REPORT. 2.5815
INTERROGATION TRANSCRIPT: [REDACTED] (PROTECTED WITNESS, SIGNED IN AS “ENGINEER”)
INTERROGATING OFFICER: [REDACTED], CDC

0 Date
FEB 14. 2192
1 Officer
Good evening John. I’m sure my colleagues have already talked to you so that’s nothing more than a formality. We just need to double-check some things before we ask other people. You ok with that ?
2 [REDACTED]
Yes, yes i am.
3 Officer
You feel nervous. Did anything happen ? Were my guys kind to you ?
4 [REDACTED]
Yes, it’s all fine. I am just in shock probably. Those events … horrible.
5 Officer
Since you remembered already - what do you know about the incident ?
6 [REDACTED]
Not Much. That day we were called on to the area for some electrical emergency. I do not know which one, as we were not able to reach the place in time. The demonstration was already happening and blocking our way.
7 Officer
Oh, okay. Did you try to contact authorities to help you get to your work place ?
8 [REDACTED]
Um … no ? It was too crowded and i was in fear for my life.
9 Officer
Totally understand ! But why didn’t you leave the premises at that point ? Your multitool recorded no position change at all till the time of the catastrophe. Can you explain that ?
10 [REDACTED]
i don’t really remember. Everyone was so scared, it was all so loud, people screaming, shots fired … I guess I must have frozen ?
11 Officer
Again, totally understandable. But the sensors show that you did not move an inch for a total of 3 hours, standing in one place. How is that possible ?
12 [REDACTED]
Well, you know, in my line of work it’s not that uncommon to stay in place for a long time. Like I said - i don’t remember.
13 Officer
Okay okay, no worries. I can understand you are traumatized surely.
But I have another question - where is the uniform that you wore that day ?
14 [REDACTED]
I don’t know. Must have burned it as the protocol dictated.
15 Officer
Protocol ? Oh, that’s a shame. Did you know that those GPS sensors were also woven into your uniform and shoes ? And some of those showed movement to the south-west of the supposed area initial impact. We thought it was a glitch of course, but we would like to hear your thoughts on that.
16 [REDACTED]
I do not know what to say. They found me in a deep trans somewhere close to -[REDACTED]- as i was told. Must have been affected by something. Can’t remember shit …
17 Officer
You do not know and can not remember … Ok John, you are free to go, for now, but please stay in contact with us. Your employer has been notified of course.
18 [REDACTED]
Yeah, right. Thank you.
19 Note
Note:
[REDACTED] gear and clothes have been found near the initial power surge area, more than 2 kilometers away from the assigned work area. Additional, advanced interrogation suggested.

title: REPORTS - Complex Endangerment & Updates (1/2)
author: Simon Cain

REPORTS
1) COMPLEX ENDANGERMENT REPORT
FROM: Simon Cain, Ring 5 SAGE, [REDACTED] COMPLEX CONTROLLER. 08.16.2174
TO : Ring 7 OVERSEER, Faux Chaplin, [REDACTED] STATION
DUE TO RECENT EVENTS ON [REDACTED] WE CONSIDER THE COMPLEX TO BE IN THE “ENDANGERED” STATUS. ALTHOUGH IT IS UNLIKELY THAT IT WILL COME UNDER DIRECT ASSAULT ANY TIME SOON (IF EVER), WE SUGGEST ASSET EVACUATION IN A GENERAL MANNER.
THE RESULTS OF THE EXPERIMENTS ARE TOO VALUABLE FOR TRANSMITTING USING THE LOCAL COMMUNICATION HUB, THEREFORE THEY SHOULD BE UPLOADED TO THE LOCAL DATA VAULT AND THEN PHYSICALLY TRANSPORTED OUT OF THE PLANET.
THE NEAREST LADING PAD IS LOCATED AT [REDACTED], AND MAY NOT BE SAFE IN CASE THE DECISION WOULD BE STALLED. PLEASE ADVISE.

2) EVENTS UPDATE
FROM: Simon Cain, Ring 5 SAGE, [REDACTED] COMPLEX CONTROLLER. 02.12.2175
TO : Ring 7 OVERSEER, Faux Chaplin, [REDACTED] STATION
THE SITUATION ON THE GROUND CONTINUES TO DETERIORATE. I UNDERSTAND THE GENERAL LACK OF CONCERN ABOUT THE CURRENT SITUATION, BUT OUR SCOUTS REPORT THAT THE LOCAL GOVERNMENT SEEMS TO BE UNABLE TO CONTAIN THE UPRISING. WE ARE PREPARING THE COMPLEX DEFENCES AND UPDATING THE DRONE PROGRAMMING JUST IN CASE THEY WOULD HAVE TO OPERATE WITHOUT THE MAINFRAME OVERSIGHT.

3) MAJOR INCIDENT
FROM: Simon Cain, Ring 5 SAGE, [REDACTED] COMPLEX CONTROLLER. 03.19.2175
TO : Ring 7 OVERSEER, Faux Chaplin, [REDACTED] STATION
WE HAD A MAJOR INCIDENT TODAY. THE MATERIALS THAT WE HAVE RECEIVED IN THE LATEST SHIPMENT SEEM TO BE UNSTABLE. ONE OF THE SAMPLES EXPLODED DURING THE EMITTING TEST. WE HAVE 5 WOUNDED TEAM MEMBERS AS A RESULT, ONE OF THEM - SEVERE. DOCTOR CANTI THINKS WE WILL BE OK BY OURSELVES, BUT IF NOT - CONTACTING THE LOCAL AUTHORITIES MIGHT BE OUR ONLY OPTION. I CAN NOT ALLOW MYSELF TO LOSE ANY OF MY COLLEAGUES, AS THEY ARE IRREPLACEABLE IN THESE CIRCUMSTANCES.
AGAIN, I INSIST ON PLANNING AN EVACUATION OF THE PERSONNEL AND RESEARCH AS THE SITUATION CONTINUES TO DETERIORATE.

1/2

Codex/Entry-1/Reports-2.title: Reports 2
Codex/Entry-1/Reports-2.content:
Reports 2


title: REPORTS - Communications Failure & Evacuation (2/2)
author: Simon Cain
date: 05.20.2176 - 01.12.2177

REPORTS
4) COMMUNICATIONS FAILURE
FROM: Simon Cain, Ring 5 SAGE, [REDACTED] COMPLEX CONTROLLER. 05.20.2176
TO : Ring 7 OVERSEER, Faux Chaplin, [REDACTED] STATION
FAUX, IF YOU WILL GET THIS - THERE HAVE BEEN A LOT OF CLASHES BETWEEN USOL FORCES AND [REDACTED] NEAR OUR LOCATION. WE ARE KEEPING A LOW PROFILE. ALL COMMUNICATION EQUIPMENT HAS BEEN SHUT DOWN TO AVOID DETECTION. OUR DIRECT LINE TO THE MAIN TRANSMITTING HUB IS CUT - EITHER BY ACCIDENT OR BY INTENT. WE DO NOT HAVE ANY OPTIONS TO CHECK IT NOR REPAIR IT.
OUR COLLEAGUES FROM [REDACTED] CENTER KEEP DELIVERING US THE IRRADIATED MATERIALS, BUT I DO NOT THINK IT WILL DO US OR THEM ANY GOOD IN THE UPCOMING DAYS. THEY SAY THEY DO NOT HAVE ANY COMMUNICATIONS WITH YOU AS WELL. NOTHING SEEMS TO BE WORKING. WE HAVE AGREED WITH [REDACTED] THAT IF WE WILL NOT GET ANY UPDATES FROM YOU OR ANY Ring 7 REPRESENTATIVES - WE WILL TRY EVACUATING CRITICAL ASSETS AND PERSONNEL.

5) EVACUATION ORDER
FROM: Simon Cain, Ring 5 SAGE, [REDACTED] COMPLEX CONTROLLER. 01.12.2177
TO : Ring 7 OVERSEER, Faux Chaplin, [REDACTED] STATION
WE HAVE WAITED LONG ENOUGH. THE MATERIALS FROM THE [REDACTED] CENTER STOPPED COMING ABOUT 2 MONTHS AGO. NO COMMUNICATION FROM THERE EITHER.
THERE IS NOTHING ELSE WE CAN DO. I HAVE 3 VTOL’S AT MY DISPOSAL AND I INTEND TO USE THEM TO EVACUATE DATA, PERSONNEL AND THE SAMPLES. IT WILL NOT BE EASY, AS I HAVE HEARD SEVERAL SHUTTLES HAVE BEEN SHOT DOWN BY THE [REDACTED]. LET’S HOPE WE CAN MAKE IT. THIS RESEARCH - IT CAN CHANGE CORE’S FUTURE. PROJECT ARTEMIS WOULD BE FULLY RESTORED. WISH US LUCK, AND I HOPE THIS MESSAGE REACHES YOU.

2/2

Codex/Entry-1/Sandman-and-Sons.title: Sandman & Sons
Codex/Entry-1/Sandman-and-Sons.content:
Sandman & Sons


title: Sandman and Sons Business Appraisal
author: Unknown
date: Unknown

DEPARTMENT OF SECURITY
Document: “Sandman and Sons Business Appraisal.”
Form E-1225, Filed Evidence

SANDMAN AND SONS
BUSINESS APPRAISAL.

“We all have gathered here to appraise the cost of the Company left to us by Solomon Sandman, a man, a father and an Undertaker.
Operating on mostly asteroid colonies, Mr Sandman has forged a reputation of a reliable businessman that was always able to handle things, even if the client was hesitating.
Many respected the man, few loved.
Yet, sadly, in recent years his business started to dwindle, as a new technology called “corpse-less disposal” was invented. Whoever made that was either a genius or pure evil, but regardless instead of a problematic corpse people started to receive precious gemstones.
For Mister Sandman, in turn, that turn of events was fatal. No customers meant no money. So he had to get to the bottom of this.
Tragically, his choice of action was to infiltrate one of the Astrocorp facilities. Needless to say, it has been well guarded.
The result came in a form of Mr. Sandman’s death to, officially, an electric shock on a perimeter fence. That did not explain some missing tissue, but a hefty settlement sum was paid to the relatives for their troubles.
So, let us start with the list of remaining assets, financial obligations and potential profits … ”

This document has been verified by the Department of Security. All rights reserved
Form E-1225, Filed Evidence

Codex/Entry-1/Sky-Lift-Assessment.title: Sky Lift Assessment
Codex/Entry-1/Sky-Lift-Assessment.content:
Sky Lift Assessment
“Sky Lift”
Today marks the 6th anniversary of a “drifting lift” - a part of a Sky Lift that has been detached from its planetary foundation. Scientists are still monitoring its orbit, now confirming that it will likely stay in the solar system.
Although the object itself was deemed not dangerous to any colony or major space station, its spin is still somewhat unpredictable, which means any smaller stations or satellites on its path are likely to be in grave danger.
We have a new task for you. Your employer would like you to take a look at the Sky Lift destruction event. We don’t think it was just an accident, there’s something behind it.
The only remaining traces of the incident are stored on an old USOL CDC archive node.
You’ll need to connect to it through the Terminal and extract whatever files are still readable.
Your task is to uncover it and report your findings.
While you were pulling data from the USOL node, our team managed to recover one more fragment related to the Sky Lift incident.
It wasn’t stored on USOL — we found it through a separate channel, partially reconstructed from CORE Tech oversight traffic.
I’ve added the file to your workspace.
Now we need to identify any individuals who might still be alive and connected to the event.
If anyone is still active in the system, we need to know.

Codex/Entry-1/Soyuz-Geological-Scan-Repo.title: Soyuz Geological Scan Report — Kolokol Site
Codex/Entry-1/Soyuz-Geological-Scan-Repo.content:
Soyuz Geological Scan Report — Kolokol Site


title: GEOLOGICAL SCAN, GRID
author: Andrej Makarov
date: AUG 2168

SOYUZ SECTOR GEOLOGIST
Andrej Makarov
SUBJECT GEOLOGICAL SCAN, GRID
DATE E [REDACTED], AUG 2168

REPORT
Our crew was able to scan the area from low orbit with our new 3d deep scanner “Kolokol”. The results show expanded ore veins of unknown origin that extend into the deeper planetary core. Although my colleagues think that this is some form of pure iron, I am hesitant to agree. The density of materials, if our scans could be considered correct, show something closer to Uranium or other dense metals.
But even that is not the problem. Somehow the scans show that this “vein” forms almost a perfect circle, or something very close to it, with a diameter of 3 kilometers. This could be considered a miracle.
That fact gives me a foundation to say that we are not looking at a mineral vein at all but rather some sort of a distortion field that disrupts our scans.
Sadly, there is no way for us to send a crew down there, as the CORE forces are still present in the area, restricting access. Maybe our colleagues from intelligence can assist with that …
If not, then we will keep scanning and prepare an unmanned solution, which could always have some sort of involvement deniability.
[REDACTED]

Codex/Entry-1/The-Day-of-Doom.title: The Day of Doom
Codex/Entry-1/The-Day-of-Doom.content:
The Day of Doom


title: 2200 The Day of Doom
author: Unknown
date: 2200

2200 The Day of Doom
We still remember that day - though fewer of us remain.
It began with the first light.
The people rose to cast out the Oppressors at last. Freedom from CORE and those USOL pets felt within reach.
The “March of Salvation” started near the old pit. Brother Matheus spoke of hope, the Spirit, and the future. The regime was falling - factories silent, drones failing, the people awoke.
When the march began, thousands moved towards the Haven Gateway, the great Skylift that fed USOL’s power from orbit. We aimed to cut their lifeline.
The path was harsh - mud, wind, sand - but no one turned back. At the base, we met the “police”, the same ones who’s stolen our kin. Rage broke loose. A riot.
The oppressors fled inside and sealed the lifts.
Then came the roar.
Lightning tore through the tower: part of it drifted into space. The air itself vanished - screams, silence, then darkness.
When I woke, the world was ash and ruin. Matheus stood beside me, blooded but alive. We turned towards the sky.
The fight was won - but the cost was our blood.

Codex/Entry-1/Tripe-Incident-Summary.title: Tripe Incident Summary
Codex/Entry-1/Tripe-Incident-Summary.content:
Tripe Incident Summary
Field Reports
The Tripe folder outlines a contaminated-operation scenario that escalated far beyond normal military loss. Report fragments, the day-of-doom article and the USOL after-action record all describe a chain of exposure, panic and command response that no one involved could fully contain once it started.
Working Conclusion
The key value of the bundle is not a single culprit but the pattern: something experimental reached a live operational environment, spread through personnel and left authorities balancing cleanup, secrecy and survivability. It fits the broader investigation thread of dangerous test material escaping its intended boundaries.

Codex/Entry-1/USOL-AAR-Report.content:
USOL AAR Report
sourceUrl: cdn.cor3.gg/corie/loops/4/usol_aar_report.png
USOL AAR Report


Type: IMAGE
Last Seen: 04-24 20:35:06



title: AAR (AFTER ACTION REPORT) - 2191
author: Cpt. Martin Skypovski
date: 2191
reference_url: image_41d635.jpg

AAR (AFTER ACTION REPORT)
CPT. MARTIN SKYPOVSKI, CDC
REDACTED
2191

REPORT
OUR SECURITY FORCE HAS BEEN TASKED WITH PREVENTING EXCESSES DURING THE PEACEFUL DEMONSTRATION ORGANIZED BY THE LOCAL CULT.
THE DEMONSTRATION WAS TETHERED TO A LOCAL HOLIDAY - DAY OF THE FIRST COLONISTS.
Local cults and “secret societies” have always used that day to stir discord between local government and the common folk, so we were well equipped to prevent any unnecessary violence.
OUR FORCE CONSISTED OF 4 TACTICAL SQUADS:


“WEASEL” SQUAD, SGT. FUSSBENDER: Negotiation team, usually responsible for talking to the main instigators


“FULCRUM” SQUAD, SGT. SOUTHLAND: Team of highly trained operatives tasked with neutralization of most violent targets


“OCULUS” SQUAD, SGT. KENWOOD: Oversight and recon squad which was monitoring situation as a whole


“CERBERUS” SQUAD, SGT. KEEN: “Heavy” squad, the ones that always took it all head on.


We were positioned near the entrance to Sky Lift as a main and only defence of the structure.
Due to Precentor Mc Mitney’s orders we were not allowed to carry firearms, as the march was supposed to be peaceful. Yet, fully aware of what those people could do, almost each of us had a personal firearm equipped.
That day things started to escalate quickly.
By the mid day the main body of the so-called “parade” had reached the foundation of Space Lift. The crowd was very much agitated, instigated by the local priests and basic instinct of destruction. Knowing that, Sgt Fussbender tried to find someone “responsible” to have a chat with and de-escalate. Sadly, it did not work, as the main instigators were staying further away from the main body of the parade, so there was no way to reach them. Due to that fact, the negotiation team was called back, but only 5 out of 10 operatives returned. The fate of the remaining people is unknown due to later events.
Since the crowd was deemed irresponsive, a Fulcrum squad was called in, to get the instigators. They were partially successful in capturing one of the most loud instigators. Sadly, this has become a trade as one of the operatives was “detained” by the crowd as well. His disability to blend in was deemed shameful but non life-threatening.
Yet, the fact of the operative’s capture became a trigger for a more aggressive approach, and as the protestors reached the main entrance, the Cerberus squad was activated. In a few next minutes the “march” became a violent confrontation between the frenzied crowd and USOL elite counter-riot unit. The guys were buying us time.
We have radioed in the retreat request but to no avail - all communications were jammed because of the special decree, to prevent information spread. Apparently the higher ups decided that each critical location could be defended by a handful of trained and motivated operatives. One hour later those operatives had to withdraw into the Sky Lift building and later on ascend to the docks, blocking internal lifts behind them. Yet, the protestors, not happy that they didn’t receive a “piece of flesh” as they were shouting, decided to follow us to the top.
By the time they reached the docking area, our shuttlecraft was ready and waiting. All of the remaining team members had safely evacuated the premises.
While boarding the shuttle, Sgt Keen reported that he had intercepted a signal that looked like either a heavily disturbed or fully encrypted communication attempt, but he was not able to decipher the correct protocol.
As the ship was undocking from the space dock, a large EMP wave (or something similar) cut through the station.
We saw one of the departing ships lose all power, which led to an uncontrollable spin near one of the docks. A few minutes later that ship crashed into the dock itself. The explosion triggered a chain reaction, which blew a major chunk off the station, presumably killing whomever was inside. About 20 minutes later, after our crew was able to reinstate power generation, we received an order to withdraw from the planet premises and meet with the incoming USOL 6th support fleet.

TOTAL CASUALTIES LIST: * 8 OPERATIVES MIA

2 OPERATIVES CONFIRMED KIA


OPERATION STATUS: FAILED

Codex/Entry-1/USOL-Interrogation-Report-.title: USOL Interrogation Report — Sgt. Beck Incident
Codex/Entry-1/USOL-Interrogation-Report-.content:
USOL Interrogation Report — Sgt. Beck Incident


title: THE INTERROGATION - 05.12.2201
author: Major Blevsky
date: 05.12.2201

THE INTERROGATION
that took place on
REDACTED
05.12.2201,
at the local USOL security outpost

Major Blevsky:
I ask again, what happened to your team Sergeant ?
Sgt. Beck:
I swear to God sir, i do not know ! We were on the usual patrol, everything was as always ! Then, suddenly we all heard that shrieking sound. We all froze for a second or two. It sounded like a metal pipe was torn apart by some massive force. Then, Alex disappeared. He was standing behind me like 5 meters away but no one saw how it happened. He just vanished !
Major Blevsky:
Did you search for him ? Who gave the order to separate ?
Sgt. Beck:
I think it was the Lieutenant. It was his voice, I’m sure ! But we didn’t see him, only a figure walking into the bushes. It looked a bit weird from the back but no one took care of it as we were stressed anyway. So we dispersed and started searching the area.
Major Blevsky:
How long was it until you understood that you lost all contact with the others ?
Sgt. Beck:
I am not sure, Sir. It felt like only 5 or 10 minutes passed but when I looked at my multitool the chronometer said 3 hours had passed. But I swear that the sun did not move ! The lights were all the same !
Major Blevsky:
Focus, Sergeant ! What did you hear ? Was there any radio contact at any time ? How did you feel ? What did you do ?
Sgt. Beck:
It was all quiet, Sir. In fact, I can swear I have never been so calm in my life. I felt … purpose. Everything around me was in slow motion. I felt the universe, I felt I knew everything in the world. It was a very pleasant but stunning feeling. So I did nothing, just stood there for a while, but as soon as it passed i’v continued my search by moving down south.
Major Blevsky:
How did you get out of there ?
Sgt. Beck:
Well I’ve figured we went up north all the time so I’ve decided to head back. I have looked for my squad mates, but tried to keep quiet at all times. I had a feeling that someone or something was watching me. All that time that I was walking the thick fog covered the area, so I did not see anything, until I suddenly stumbled at the monorail foundation. After that I went east and was found by our patrol.
Major Blevsky:
What else do you remember ? Do you recall the exact coordinates of the incident ?
Sgt. Beck:
No sir. I have tried to recall that but failed. It is like something is blocking me from remembering …
Major Blevsky:
All right Sargeant. You are dismissed.

Sgt. Beck walked out of the interrogation room.
Major Blevsky:
Same as all of them. Memory loss and disorientation. What do the medical examinations tell us, Lieutenant ?
Lt. Kovalsky:
As you know, we have found 3 fully decayed bodies, 2 soldiers in a state of limbo and 3 of them with light wounds and disorientation. Reports showed that they were in a squad of 10 people, initially. Our scans show residual radiation on the bodies, and some “weird” readings on all metal surfaces. I do not have an explanation. The brains of all soldiers both alive and dead have been somehow affected. But most important … that squad has been considered MIA since 2175. My suggestion would be to proceed with further studies on all soldiers using advanced techniques of different sorts. This information might be crucial on the matter we are looking at currently …
Major Blevsky:
Heartless bastard, as always, Mr. Kovalsky. Very well, proceed. And may god have mercy on our souls for that.

Codex/Entry-1/Weird-Case.content:
Weird Case


title: WEIRD CASE - Intercepted Meeting Transcript
author: Lt. Frank Sullivan
date: 2182

DEPARTMENT OF SECURITY
Document: “Weird Case”
Form E-928C, Filed Evidence

WEIRD CASE
[REDACTED] 2182, INTERCEPTED MEETING TRANSCRIPT

15:52 Brother Malkob:

Child, did you make up your mind? Are you willing and ready to follow the path of the First Explorers?

15:53 Recruit:

Yes, Father. My will is adamant, I will do all that’s needed to become one of you. I will fight for our planet and our faith.

15:55 Brother Malkob:

Then walk with me to the holy fields, that grant us all their salvation. Holy food and water awaits you there, and after you are ready we shall start our ritual.


A body has been found near what appears to be a chemist lab of some sort. Internal organs are partially removed or look to be turned into something soup-like.
The corpse appears fresh but there have been no reports about any missing people for over a month now, yet it matches the description of a young fellow that was looking to join Cult of the Eternal.
We suspect that this individual has been used for testing of some biological compound that didn’t work that well. By the orders of the local Peace facility we would have to conduct our search regardless. I would report results as we get them.
CDC (Colony development corps),
Lt. Frank Sullivan.

Codex/Entry-1/Zulu-12_Sector.title: Zulu-12 Sector
Codex/Entry-1/Zulu-12_Sector.content:
Zulu-12 Sector


title: Zulu 12 Sector Status - Update 2085
author: Silvia Shepherd
date: 2085

ASTROCROP
Zulu 12 Sector Status
UPDATE 2085
PRESENTED BY:
Caretaker Silvia Shepherd,
5th Reclaimation Regiment.
Redacted copy.

… Our recent advancements in plant genome modification provide us hope that a new breed of trees we are growing would be durable enough to sustain the harsh conditions of the Zulu sector.
Unfortunately, all of our experiments so far have failed due to extreme soil pollution.
The 5th Reclaimation Regiment suggests that the Zulu 12 Sector should be cleansed of all polluting equipment and machinery. We understand that some production in the area is critical to supply chains of the local concrete plants and light machinery plants, but we would like to state that adding a new, fast growing, forest would make a territory of about 300 square kilometers habitable.
We insist that creating a new habitat for our growing population would be much more “profitable” in the long run then draining all the scarce resources that are still stuck in the mud.
Alternatively, we would like to suggest investigating sectors 13 and 15 for possible testing sites for the new plants. Our initial scans indicate that chemical pollution levels there should be lower, although the radiation levels are still extreme due to the collapse of nearby nuclear stations.
Considering all the above, we would like to start sending scouting parties to sectors 12, 13 and 15 to further investigate the actual situation. Also, we believe that the Sustenance prerogative should be made aware of a potential CORE Tech complex located somewhere in the area.
Meanwhile, our Biotechs claim they are almost prepared to present a new version of the Plant that would be radiation resistant (to a point, of course) AND would NOT store that radiation in itself. They are estimated to be ready for tests in 2 standard Terran months.
That is all for me.
Praised be the Mother.

Codex/Entry-2/Bezdelniki-Intel-Report.title: Bezdelniki Intel Report
Codex/Entry-2/Bezdelniki-Intel-Report.content:
Bezdelniki Intel Report
Mail: Intel report, PALIMPEST.
From: Serhio
To: -redacted-
BOSS ! Those Vokrt imbeciles attacked another shop. It is the 2nd one this week. The whole neighborhood is pissed and wants their blood, but, apparently, someone is giving them guns !
And not only that, it looks like that “someone” is selling those guns to other involved parties as well.
It will be pure chaos down here soon !
My guys found a modified plasma cutter that can shoot up to 30 meters boss ! This is insane !   Well, I mean, it will explode after the shot of course … but you know what I mean ! Can you help us please ?
Also, we have followed their leader - that “Antouan” dude. He’s creepy as fuck, and everyone is scared of him, but what we heard is that his own man are saying he changed recently, became obsessed with something and even more violent  AND he keeps visiting that  “Velluto” place, you know, with girls …
You know who that belongs to, right ?  Guys think it’s somehow connected to the recent heist. Like someone in there talked to the guy. Where else could he get that information on time and place?
We took a liberty to ask the usual guy for help and he was able to find their internal site address,  “backroom.local”   but it’s encrypted and we could not get a password.  Need someone with skills, you know …
One more thing, Boss.  With all due respect, we think that those Voktr guys are not the ones calling the shots. They are dumb.  Like no way they did all that on their own.

Codex/Entry-2/Cargo-Hold-Repair-Report-2.title: Cargo Hold Repair Report 2
Codex/Entry-2/Cargo-Hold-Repair-Report-2.content:
Cargo Hold Repair Report 2

Report
Supplement to the report on work in the cargo hold:
After clearing the container heap in the hold, the crew initiated diagnostics on the Fetcher 2 AMR logistics robot (Fetcher_242 unit) to assess the damage. Attempts were also made to restore its functionality.
Diagnostics showed that the damage were received:
Manipulators - minor damage, impact on functionality is minimal
Drive pods - Geometry is damaged, but functionality is preserved. Increased battery consumption is possible while use. Risk of drive overload while use. Replacement is recommended.
Body damage: a dent approximately 3 cm deep, according to the device’s drawings, in the area of the battery pack. There is a high probability of battery damage. Disassembling the robot’s body is not possible on the ship board.
With this damage the robot does not perform its function, giving an error P0A80.
Technician Charlie’s attempts to restore the robot took considerable time and were unsuccessful. This failure may be due not only to the complexity of the situation but also to Charlie’s own “complexities.”
Robot Repair Assessment:
At best scenario - robot maintenance at a service center, replacement of battery cells or the entire battery
At worst scenario - acquisition of a new robot.

Codex/Entry-2/Forensic-Explosive-Report.title: Forensic Explosive Report
Codex/Entry-2/Forensic-Explosive-Report.content:
Forensic Explosive Report
FORENSIC EXPLOSIVE MATERIALS REPORT
Case Reference: 9912-47-L
Laboratory ID: CFX-8841
Requesting Unit: Outer Transit Patrol
Date Received: [REDACTED]
Date Completed: [REDACTED]
Submitted Materials:
— Fragmented metallic residues (vehicle structure)
— Soil samples from detonation center and periphery
— Trace particulate collected from debris field
— Swab samples from recovered remains and equipment fragments
Methodology:
— Gas Chromatography–Mass Spectrometry (GC-MS)
— Fourier-transform infrared spectroscopy (FTIR)
— Ion chromatography (IC)
— Scanning electron microscopy with energy-dispersive X-ray spectroscopy (SEM-EDS)
— Differential scanning calorimetry (DSC)
Findings:
Explosive Classification
Analysis confirms the presence of a high-order explosive compound.
The explosive does not correspond to any commercially registered
civilian, mining, or industrial explosive formulation.
No direct match found in the Council Explosives Reference Database (CERD).
Chemical Composition (Detected Components)
Primary energetic compounds:
— Cyclotrimethylenetrinitramine (RDX): trace to moderate presence
— Pentaerythritol tetranitrate (PETN): trace presence
Secondary compounds:
— Stabilized nitrate esters
— Polymer-bonded energetic matrix (PBX-like structure)
Additives and modifiers:
— Phlegmatizing agents (exact formulation undetermined)
— Plasticizers consistent with controlled detonation shaping
— Micro-particulate aluminum oxide residues (oxidation byproduct)
Notably absent:
— Ammonium nitrate (AN)
— Fuel oil residues (FO)
— Chlorates or perchlorates
— Black powder constituents
Manufacturing Indicators
The detected compound exhibits:
— Homogeneous molecular distribution
— Absence of impurity clustering
— Controlled grain morphology
These characteristics are inconsistent with improvised explosive devices (IEDs).
The formulation suggests:
— Laboratory-controlled synthesis
— Access to precursor purification
— Knowledge of detonation velocity optimization
Detonation Characteristics
Estimated detonation velocity:
— Between 7,200 and 7,800 m/s (calculated)
Blast pattern analysis indicates:
— Directed energy release
— Limited secondary fragmentation
— Minimal residue dispersion beyond expected radius
This suggests:
— Precise charge placement
— Pre-calculated detonation geometry
Initiation System
No intact detonator components recovered.
However, residue patterns indicate:
— Multi-stage initiation sequence
— Use of a high-reliability primary charge
Electronic initiation cannot be confirmed or excluded.
Environmental Interaction
Soil nitration levels are consistent with:
— Short-duration high-temperature exposure
— Absence of prolonged combustion
No evidence of post-detonation fire was detected.
Comparative Analysis
The explosive composition does not match:
— Known terrorist attack profiles
— Recent cartel-related explosive incidents
— Common PMC operational munitions
No direct attribution possible based on chemical profile alone.
Conclusion:
The explosive material used in Incident 9912-47-L
was a professionally manufactured high-order explosive.
The device does not align with:
— Improvised constructions
— Opportunistic criminal activity
The origin, manufacturer, and delivery method
cannot be determined based on available evidence.
Report prepared by:
Forensic Chemistry Division
End of report.
