Codex/Entry-2/Operation-Aquarium-Follow-.title: Operation Aquarium Follow-Up
Codex/Entry-2/Operation-Aquarium-Follow-.content:
Operation Aquarium Follow-Up
Oh so that’s what Jake was talking about. I thought that it would be something like a military operation or something like that, but this… a terrorist strike during a test launch… interesting, I guess.
I should probably find more about those Technofreedom guys and their actions though. I’d bet that Vladimir guy is the one I’ve talked to. He seemed shady enough. Normally, it would make sense to find more about the group, get some intel and then contact him… but just for this one time, I’ll just press him directly. Something tells me that he will talk.
Password cracked: grv1204JJ
Server address: jj_private

Codex/Entry-2/Operation-Aquarium-Log.title: Operation Aquarium Log
Codex/Entry-2/Operation-Aquarium-Log.content:
Operation Aquarium Log
Entry 1
Okay, so, “Operation Aquarium”. I have definitely heard that on the news somewhere. So I’ve got two options: either to scroll through all the old stuff I’ve searched for or just try the “news archive”.
If I remember correctly, that “news archive” site is basically a database with a simple embedded search engine, which might not be working at all, because the site has been discontinued quite some time ago.
So.
Step 1: Find the site
Step 2: Hack the Site
Step 3: Get the information
…
Step 5: Rejoice!
I just hope that this lead would not get me into even more trouble… but whom am I kidding…
Entry 2
Well, this has been a hell of a flight.
Intrigue my ass …
Aurana is Jean, I was working for Osiris, got myself involved with some crazy “universe balancers” guys … I should probably visit a casino with that kind of luck. Or maybe I should stay away from gambling as far as possible. Depends on the point of view I guess.
But seriously, all things considered, events are just starting to unfold it seems.
The question of “why did those guys choose me” still remains and they are being super secretive about it. I would have to talk to Aurana as soon as I enter that station. This needs to be solved and I will not stay in the dark any more.
On the bright side of things - I have acquired several new friends. All of them might come useful for my job. Obviously I will have to stay cautious with information sharing, but their resources would be very useful. Both Gravers and Palimpest seem to be decent guys. Well, Palimpest is working with CDEA so might be careful about that, but aside from that … we will see.
Also, I have acquired a lot of information on the Private Club PMC, and although currently they could not be of use to me that may change when I get to the station. Having outside muscle is always good and their connections could come in handy. The only problem is that they do not really know about my involvement and might not be happy about it at all. So this “problem” should be treated very carefully.
As for the events in general … this whole affair with Jean \ Aurana seems just straight up bad. Osyris, whomever they are, are not the good guys. My investigations have uncovered lots of inappropriate actions taken by them, in which I do not see how “goals can justify the means”. It is not how it is supposed to be working.
In regards to Jack. That guy … I swear I think he is role playing a scumbag. And he is doing it very well. But he is dangerous and he IS playing a role. That would be a problem later, I am sure of it and there is nothing I can do about it, at least for now.
All these “controlling the universe” lines … and yet he said he is “not CORE, at least not the one you can think of”. What does that even mean ? There is only one CORE …
The more I think about it, the more my headaches return. Working on those mysteries actually helped, but now it’s all coming back.
Also, this Vladimir guy, i am certain that I have seen him, or information about him before. Technofreedom group - this rings a lot of bells. They have been one of the major sabotage groups operating on the colonies, fighting against AI. But if he said that all that was just a ruse - might be worth it to dig through that old stuff and find more clues. Something tells me that he is not Vladimir at all.
It seems that both Vladimir and Jack would offer me something that would contradict with each other and I would have to make a choice. Such choices usually have consequences, so before making it I should really consider my options. And yes, as long as I “just” work for History Unfolded - I would have an option to make that choice, otherwise it may be made for me by someone else.
All things considered, I have done a tremendous job and they’d better appreciate it. I am getting more involved in this whole mess and, honestly, I need some personal time before we continue, so I will take the remaining time till the ship arrives at the station to properly rest and get ready for whatever is coming. There are also a few things that might be worth finishing before I arrive, could be something interesting.

Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Addendum.title: Palimpsest Addendum
Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Addendum.content:
Palimpsest Addendum
PALIMPEST Group
“Some call them freaks, others - dangerous criminals, but in fact they are nothing more than a bunch of nerds that like to test out substances and have philosophical discussions” - some random forum topic.

Document - Toxicology report (part of):
The barrels found at the crime scene contain traces of unknown chemicals. A council security officer that got in contact with the substance without protective equipment received a dose which led to extensive hallucinations, vomiting, panic attacks and “magic horrors” as he described. The dose was enough to keep his mind in an altered state for almost 8 hours. The officer was transported to the local hospital and is still under strict monitoring. Permanent neurological damage is considered possible.

News article: “A drug lab bust leads to mysterious findings”
January 4 2247 - A counter-drug task force by Council Security has been dispatched to an “Flavius” asteroid base. Upon docking, the task force was encountered by a group of unknown armed people that opened fire as soon as the transport apparel opened.
In a short firefight the offenders were quickly dispatched with no Security council losses (allegedly). Inside the base, a drug lab has been found.
Due to the officers that were participating in a raid (all names and ranks are classified), the location belonged to the CDEA (colony drug enforcement agency) - one of the most famous drug cartels that was operating throughout the whole solar system. 
Among the discovered drugs and chemicals, several barrels with “The Tantrum” label were found. The drug experts at the nearest patrol station were not able to identify the chemical components included in them, but the substance was deemed highly active and dangerous. The barrels were allegedly isolated in a secure vault for further investigation.

Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Personal-Log-1.title: Palimpsest Personal Log 1
Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Personal-Log-1.content:
Palimpsest Personal Log 1
Personal log №1:
Hmm, that report.  I wonder who those guys really are. I might have heard of them, that’s a really weird name they chose.  Kids playing criminals ? Or some criminals posing as weird kids.
That chemical stuff, I am certain I have encountered it before.  The symptoms … what was it … my memory keeps playing tricks on me.  Got it !  The Tantrum !  That’s it - it’s that damned drug, I’m sure.  So many people died of it and no one knew where it came from.  Maybe it’s my chance to find out. I need to keep digging.

Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Personal-Log-2.title: Palimpsest Personal Log 2
Codex/Entry-2/Palimpsest-Personal-Log-2.content:
Palimpsest Personal Log 2
Personal log №2:
Cartels, PMC’s, freaky dudes, politicians … What the hell am I getting myself into.
At least I hope these guys will be useful.
But the thing he said about “distributing” - it looks like those PMC guys were more involved than I’ve thought. Might have to move my investigation towards there. Could be another empty lead of course, but we will see.
Somehow I have got emotionally invested in this. I am getting old …

Codex/Entry-2/Perimeter-Patrol-Log-Full-.title: Perimeter Patrol Log — Full Transcript
Codex/Entry-2/Perimeter-Patrol-Log-Full-.content:
Perimeter Patrol Log — Full Transcript
AUDIO LOG: PERIMETER PATROL, VOICE COMMS
Damian:
Jimmy, are you around? I heard some noise close to your sector.
Jimmy:
Yeah, it’s that god damn hyppocrok again. I swear it mutated even more.
Damian:
Why do you call it that? It’s just a genetically modified crocodile.
Jimmy:
Yeah. It’s the size of a fucking hippo.
Damian:
At least it does not attack us. Pheromones and shit.
Jimmy:
Sure. But imagine it starts raining while we are on patrol.
Damian:
Kevin survived getting puked out after the last incident, didn’t he?
Jimmy:
That’s my point. One mistake and you’re dead. We don’t get paid enough for that.
Damian:
We are paid more than enough. Stop bitching.
Jimmy:
Hey… why is it so quiet all of a sudden?
Damian:
I don’t know. Let’s go check.
[two silenced shots]
Omega 12:
Sir, targets neutralized. Proceeding to the next location. Full sweep in progress.
Omega Actual:
Affirmative. Be careful. We do not know what they have been discussing. No animal heartbeats detected in the area.
[metal clanking and slurping]
Omega Actual:
Omega 12, report.
Omega 11, 13, report.
[radio silence]
Omega Actual:
All teams, fall back and RTB.
[footsteps approach after several minutes]
Unknown:
Damn boys… stop eating that, that’s evidence. Leave something for identification.
Robotic voice:
Commander voice confirmed, disengaging.
Unknown:
Robo crocs. Who would have known. Best investment ever.
[end of recording]

Codex/Entry-2/Personal-Diary.title: Personal Diary
Codex/Entry-2/Personal-Diary.content:
Personal Diary
Today I looked at the dome again and thought it presses harder than the vacuum outside.
Below it are the old shafts. At least down there it feels possible to breathe for real.
Grav isn’t about falling. It’s about choosing where you land.
There are too many eyes on the surface.

Codex/Entry-2/Police-Report-Jean-Flander.title: Police Report: Jean Flanders
Codex/Entry-2/Police-Report-Jean-Flander.content:
Police Report: Jean Flanders
Document: Police report, missing person
Luna, August 18, 2250.
Report by: Sergeant McMaffee, stationed : Lunar sector, CSPS station 3 (council security patrol station).
Missing person - Jean Flanders, 28 years old.
Reporting - her mother, Suzanna Flanders, 64 years old.
Mother claims that her daughter went for a drive with her boyfriend, by the name of [[James Curtis Fung|“Jack”]]. Daughter claimed to be going to the nearest spaceport “for a spin”. Last seen exiting interstate 65, heading to the private launch site “Gargoyle”.
Investigation:
The launch site is private property and protected by the local [[Private Club PMC|“Private Club” PMC]]. Access is restricted without a warrant. The cameras alongside the highway were partially malfunctioning that day, although the recording shows 1 car of a fitting description heading towards the spaceport.
The security guards at the gate claim that the car has not entered the premises, inclining that it could have turned several kilometers before that.
The drone area scan around the launch site showed no trace of a car, yet the insides of the territory could not be scanned because of the privacy protection jammers.
Automated patrols that were also dispatched found no trace of the car outside of the launch site perimeter.
Solution: Requesting search warrant.
Additional: August 20, 2250.
A witness has been found.
[[Vladimir Semakin|Vladimir Semakin]], 54, Garbage disposal manager
Witness statement:
I was minding my own business, staying near the launch side, as always, when a crazy guy ran out of the guarded area, eyes wide open. I think he was drooling or something.
As soon as he saw me, he approached me and started shouting something like “VLADIMIR - WE HAVE A CRIMINAL - MOUNT THE HORSES”.
I have no clue what that meant. And I did not know that guy or how he knew me. But I am kinda a regular in those parts so everyone knows me anyway.
The guy ran towards the nearby hills. I decided to follow because I was worried about him.
It seemed as if he was looking for something. Then he literally pushed a rock and some voice said “Please state your name and rank”. He started shouting for no reason but then got a hold of himself and said “James Fung, Corporal”.
Then a garage door slid away. But before he could enter, a “Private Club” patrol car got to him. They dragged him inside the vehicle and left.
It looks like they didn’t see me.
After they left I went to check on that garage, but was not able to find that stone he pushed or turned or whatever. So i just left.
I can show the location but please keep my name out of it. I don’t want any trouble.
End Report
f-10bt-ust.corie

Codex/Entry-2/Private-Club-Notes.title: Private Club Notes
Codex/Entry-2/Private-Club-Notes.content:
Private Club Notes
Entry 1
Private Club PMC website. Not a bad place to start the investigation. Jane disappeared on their territory, and her boyfriend, Jack, worked for them — which means the traces should be somewhere close, even if someone tried to clean them up.
I need to go through their site as thoroughly as possible. Even the public sections might hide small clues: mission reports, names, dates, callsigns. If I’m lucky, I’ll find something about incidents on their grounds, or at least indirect references. The key is to pull any thread related to Jack — confirmation that he was on the roster, where he’s assigned now, whether he was transferred somewhere
If I can gather enough information, maybe I’ll be able to reach him directly. Or at least find someone who was near him that day.
Entry 2
I’m still working on Jean Flander’s disappearance case. For someone of her background it makes no sense how she just vanishes without a trace.
The authorities would surely have launched a thorough enough investigation to bring the Douglas Flanders daughter back home, or find her at least. I don’t understand what I could do that they couldn’t, or what it is I am missing.
I am stuck. The information I have so far just raises so many more questions, who the hell was this girl? The more I look into her the less clear the image of her is in my mind. Maybe that’s the issue? Maybe this person I have in my head could not have disappeared like she did, because it’s not her? I need to reframe things, approach it from a different angle.
There’s only so many people I can reach out to to find out more about Jean. The only ones who are obviously connected to her are her parents. If I reach out to them it could be helpful or cause unnecessary issues for me. I might not have any choice but to go straight to the source. Suzanne, her mother, hasn’t stopped looking for her and maybe I can bet on a mothers love to get some answers without causing too much of a stir.
Entry 3
So this guy, “Jack”. That’s one weird fella. First he helps kidnap the girl, then helps her escape and then covers her trail somehow. And he is even able to resist that substance they are talking about.
And that company - “QQ Energy”, I need to find more about it probably, but maybe a bit later.
It would be a solid thing to get information about Camp Vernon, whatever that is. And if i am lucky - might be worth it to get the guy out of there. He may be of use to me. Besides, this story is becoming more and more complex and I feel that Vladimir is also not telling me everything either.
I think it is time to contact my new friends in PALIMPEST and ask for another favor. No doubt that will cost me, but there is no other way around.
Entry 4
One object stands out. DC7-447-X. Shuttle-scale. Thermal core variance. EM pockets. Triple echo profile.
That’s not random debris. Someone flagged it manually. And then the logs were cut.
Entry 5
Who is that guy ? All those documents … holy shit. Camo cloak ? Energy weapons ? It’s rare even for CORE. I need to try and find him somehow, but it may as well be impossible.
Although, I wonder why all those documents were left on the base. Like someone wanted me to find them. This is getting super weird.
I can not believe all this, it’s like in a god damn movie ! It’s just impossible.
But nevertheless, I need to hope for the best. The only last clue I have is “QQ Energy”. Finding out about that company could lead me to the guy.
If that would lead nowhere then I’ll just have to hope for the best and try some other means to find her.

Codex/Entry-2/Private-Club-Personnel-Fil.title: Private Club Personnel File — James "Jack" Curtis Fung
Codex/Entry-2/Private-Club-Personnel-Fil.content:
Private Club Personnel File — James “Jack” Curtis Fung
Dossier
The personnel file presents Jack as a decorated former USOL marine and asteroid-belt veteran, but the unofficial section paints a darker picture: anti-riot work, deep-blue operations, strong weapons aptitude and almost no surviving social ties. Psychological screening flags PTSD and strange memory instability, including stories about events he could not have witnessed.
Interrogation
Internal Affairs questioned Jack after he failed to deliver a girl to Private Club handlers. During interrogation he was injected with a truth-inducing substance by Donovan. Under chemical pressure he refused to disclose the girl’s location, but one answer slipped through: QQ Energy. Afterward the interrogator ordered him transferred to Camp Vernon and all evidence on site destroyed.

Codex/Entry-2/Project-Schwarze-Sonne.title: Project Schwarze Sonne
Codex/Entry-2/Project-Schwarze-Sonne.content:
Project Schwarze Sonne
Customer Data Archive
Mail correspondence between professor Gerhard Zonge and Samuel Packston describes delivery of a so-called Black Sun device. Early accidental activation caused tremors, trance-like states and neurological distortion. Zonge still planned to present the device during a private gamma party, while hidden manual sections implied more dangerous parameters were intentionally protected.
Gamma Party Incident
The party recording shows fifteen guests gathered within the required radius before activation. What followed was nearly ten minutes of screams, loss of control and apparent neural collapse. The device’s own informator announced that all targeted individuals had been affected and the mission objective had been achieved.
Internal Assessment
Follow-up reports make it clear that the operation was not meant to kill. Younger subjects were hospitalized, middle-aged subjects suffered severe neurological damage, and older ones broke down completely. The core conclusion was that the prototype had run in cleanse mode instead of controlled indoctrination mode. Doctor Feud was then ordered to keep experimenting until the effect became stable, repeatable and useful for covert mass control.
Supplemental Brief
A classified project note places Black Sun on Ganymede and describes it as a microwave emitter built to rewrite human brain-wave patterns into obedience. Animal testing had already failed catastrophically, yet the project moved toward direct human trials using a modified power cell from a Martian facility. Feud’s personal log suggests he no longer believed the device produced control at all, only erasure of self.

Codex/Entry-2/Search-Party-Report.title: Search Party Report
Codex/Entry-2/Search-Party-Report.content:
Search Party Report
Search party report
August 21, 2250
[[Cassius Maelstrom|Captain Cassius Maelstrom]], Lunar sector, CSCH (council security central hub)
A search and rescue team has been dispatched after the witness statement was acquired. Upon arrival at the target area, after a thorough scan of the location, an artificial hill with a cavity in it was found. Inside, a partially disassembled vehicle was located. Most parts of the vehicle have been removed but the remains fit the description of the car the Daughter was last seen in.
Near the car, several barrels with some sort of acid were located. Preliminary analysis indicates some sort of acid. Further more tests are required. Traces of multiple DNA’s were found on the barrels as well.
Suspect in question - [[James Curtis Fung|James Curtis Fung, corporal]]. Ex military, corporate forces, PMC operator. Whereabouts unknown.
The launch site is sealed, no personnel present. The automatic security system is armed and requires additional codes for access. Further investigation and a property sweep is required.
End report

Codex/Entry-2/Sector-7-Compliance-Memo.title: Sector 7 Compliance Memo
Codex/Entry-2/Sector-7-Compliance-Memo.content:
Sector 7 Compliance Memo
MO CHEMICALS
Industrial Oversight & Environmental Systems Division
────────────────────────────────────────
INTERNAL MEMORANDUM IV
Classification: Level IV – Operational Risk
Distribution: Executive Operations, Environmental Compliance, Site Security Command
Date: [Redacted]
Reference: Sector 7 Waste Storage Review
Subject: Waste Storage Compliance – Sector 7 Containment Yard
This memorandum serves as a formal notice regarding irregularities observed within waste storage and containment operations in Sector 7.
A preliminary compliance review identified discrepancies between intake declarations, drum markings, and yard positioning records. While findings remain administrative in classification, combined anomalies elevate this matter to a potential Operational Risk status pending executive review.
Intake & Labeling Discrepancies
Routine inspection of contaminant units within Batch Range A7-1154 through A7-1193 revealed the following:
4 barrels recorded as standard industrial acid solution tested positive for compound residue inconsistent with declared intake composition.
2 units displayed minor seal compromise consistent with improper mechanical handling.
3 units were physically relocated within yard perimeter without corresponding digital movement logs.
2 units were not located during randomized physical audit.
The detected compound variance does not currently exceed regulated toxicity thresholds for industrial classification; however, deviation from declared source composition requires reconciliation to maintain licensing protections.
Environmental Compliance advises immediate reconciliation of intake documentation with physical inventory.
Yard Security Observations
Site Security Command submitted two incident summaries over the last quarter documenting:
Disturbance of perimeter fencing adjacent to Sector 7 waste storage yard.
Evidence of attempted barrel access, including pry marks and displaced containment units.
Presence of unregistered individuals in proximity to chemical storage zones.
Security assessment suggests attempted material removal; motivation remains undetermined. At this time, no confirmed hazardous material extraction has been documented.
Repeated perimeter interference increases liability exposure should independent audit occur.
Regulatory Exposure Assessment
The combination of:
Unlabeled contaminant variance
Incomplete movement logs
Unsecured perimeter access
may invite scrutiny from municipal regulators or external auditors.
Given the sensitivity of chemical handling operations within Sector 7, leadership is advised to treat this matter as preventative risk mitigation rather than reactive compliance.
Recommended Actions
Conduct full audit of waste intake documentation for Sector 7 (past 90 days).
Reconcile contaminant profiles against original source manifests.
Review after-hours access logs and camera uptime reports.
Confirm disposal contractors adhere to chain-of-custody documentation.
Consider temporary suspension of discretionary disposal until reconciliation is complete.
Environmental Compliance further recommends restricting discussion of these findings to Level IV clearance and above until inventory variance is resolved.
Filed by:
Industrial Oversight & Environmental Systems Division
[Digitally Scanned Signature – Redacted]
MO CHEMICALS
Operational Integrity Through Controlled Process

Codex/Entry-2/Transit-Fragment-Summary.title: Transit Fragment Summary
Codex/Entry-2/Transit-Fragment-Summary.content:
Transit Fragment Summary
Recovered Package
The timeline disk is not a polished record set. It is a deliberately messy package of videos, images and audio slices that had to be reconstructed during transit to Mars. That framing matters, because it turns the fragments into an active briefing rather than passive background material.
Narrative Use
Combined with the transit journal, the fragment set marks the shift from the initial contract into the Martian phase of the investigation. The player is no longer reviewing old evidence from a distance; they are carrying unstable archival material into the next theater where those past events are expected to connect with present actors.

Codex/Entry-2/Transit-Journal.title: Transit Journal
Codex/Entry-2/Transit-Journal.content:
Transit Journal
Entry 1
Today my journey begins. The flight should take me straight to the Martian REPNode, from where i will continue my investigation.
The reason i agreed to this is pretty simple - intrigue. I feel that i am getting myself into something big, and that worries me, but thrills at the same time.
The past investigations that i’ve done lead me to a thought that all of those events are somehow connected. Maybe not directly, and maybe just by coincidence, but still connected, as if someone very powerful is pulling all the strings, making stars align.
My employers - “History Unfolded” seem to be worried somehow. Although i am certain that they have already established their presence on the station, or even on the planet itself, it seems that their “tools” are not suited for a further investigation.
Somehow, it feels like they are interested in me personally, for whatever reason.
This flatters me of course, but raises questions about the origins of such interest. My whole life, as i can remember, i have been a “rolling stone”. Never stayed in one place for a long time, never had any attachments to people.
I have been a security operator, a junior technician on one of the mining stations, a truck driver on Luna, then, again, an enforcer for one of the corporations, an assistant captain for one of the Terran’s trade route cargo ships and so on and so forth.
That one time i was even tied up in a difficult situation and had to herd cats. That was a weird one.
But all this life experience did not prepare me for becoming a PI. And yet, after i set up my resume and started looking for contracts as a Private investigator, i’ve received that job offer within 3 days.
This could look suspicious or totally coincidental, depending on how paranoid I would like to be.
Another problem is that I always have that feeling that something is missing. An item, a person, a memory … I do not know what. And as far as I can recall, that has always been an issue.
But since i have started working on those investigations things got worse.
I have tried talking to a remote medical assistant and even paid for a brain scan, but the results showed nothing uncommon, aside from traces of an old concussion that I have no memory about.
Could that be the source of all problems ? Might be. But my hunch, that i have been relying on a lot, tells me it’s not that simple. The fact that i do not remember big chunks of my past is not a thing to just throw away.
But why does that bother me so much all of the sudden … maybe it’s space. Too much time to think, I have tried to avoid that for quite some time …
Entry 2
This reader looks like a standard CORE-issued model. Some markings on its casing … the model seems to be “MR-7 Media Reader 78x”. It’s likely one of the CCS data reader models that I have come across from time to time, but they usually have different software, so the manual would be very handy. Time to look it up I guess.
Entry 3
Look what we got here. Looks like some fragments of a video file. But it’s not full so I guess opening each part would take an extra effort. And there seem to be quite a lot of them …
My best guess is that it might be some sort of an educational video for CCS colonists, or some historical stuff. But you’d never know - might as well be an R rated home video, so much weird shit i’v seen after all, huh.
Anyways, it would definitely take some time to unlock all of those and while it might be properly entertaining I think I would need to find something else to do, while maintaining a low profile on this ship.

I know how this sounds.
I dont care.
She should not be there anymore.
Manager:
You know how this works.
She is not property.
Antonovich:
I will pay.
More than anyone.
Just tell me the number.
Manager:
I know.
I know why you are asking.
Antonovich:
Dont.
Manager:
Relax.
I wont tell your boys.
It would ruin everything for you.
The image.
The fear.
The respect.
Antonovich:
You dont understand.
Manager:
I understand perfectly.
This is why it is expensive.
Antonovich:
She is not like the others.
Manager:
You all say that.
Antonovich:
No.
She listens.
Manager:
Careful.
You are getting attached.
Antonovich:
I already am.
Manager:
Then listen to me.
If you want her safe,
you stay out of our business.
No questions.
No routes.
No curiosity.
Antonovich:
What about the delivery?
Manager:
Handled.
Antonovich:
By who?
Manager:
Professionals.
You dont need to know more.
Antonovich:
My people are asking questions.
Manager:
Let them.
They are idiots.
Antonovich:
They are still mine.
Manager:
Not for long.
And dont worry.
She will not be working anymore.
Not after this.
Antonovich:
You swear?
Manager:
I never swear.

Codex/Entry-3/Backstory.title: Backstory
Codex/Entry-3/Backstory.content:
Backstory
Mars … it took me some time to get here. And plenty of effort. Not once have I asked myself if it was really worth it. Getting so deeply involved with all these people is probably a really bad choice for a guy like me, without a clear goal. But at the same time … I have been a rolling stone for quite some time, so this was a breath of fresh air for what it’s worth.
I’v was  kinda stranded in my “old” bunk only a few months ago. Has been a jack of all trades for quite some time now, with the amount of jobs I did … well, let’s be honest here, the list was getting really short.
Private Investigator - this seemed like a super cool idea, especially for a guy like me, with extensive experience in life. Get to know new people ! Uncover secrets ! Get Paid !  Dream job.  But I did not have high hopes because people like that need to have connections which I did not really have. Only my ex-mercenary experience and some experience within the police force gave me hope.
But like someone said to me - you won’t know till you try !
So, when I got the job offer from those History Unfolded guys … let’s say I was surprised and very excited.
The contract that they sent me was really weird, and honestly, contradicting itself. But who was I to challenge that ?  After all, a really pretty handler, which went by “Aurana Strogova” was assigned to me.
Honestly - she was really cold with me initially. Like more than just “professional”, I felt some animosity even.
But that did not affect much. The tasks have started to roll.
My job was to uncover some old secrets that were buried deep enough so that the “common folk” would not be able to find those. But apparently it was not such a hard task for me. The only problem was that every time I uncovered something it felt like Aurana knew about it already.
A test to prove my skills ? That thought has visited me more than once. But I kept going anyway, as  that was “the best job in the world” for me.
The first results came out pretty scary  - bio chemical tests, experiments on crops, malfunctioning robots, weapon test failures … shit, even the missing CORE crews were there.  All those events seemed to be pretty random, until I started to see the pattern.
Someone, or something, was orchestrating all these events for reasons unknown. Each “mystery” had someone important involved:  Usol, Soyuz, Terra Mater … even the CORE itself ! Like holy crap the stakes became really high.
But I did not drop out. At this point it was obvious that it was not my skills being tested, but rather my personality. I had to prove myself to my employers, and I had to know who they really were.
So I started working harder. Like really making myself invested in it. Not only because I had to, but because the stories were just exciting. Who would have thought …
With every story more questions were answered, but even more arose.
The [[Terms#|Couplings]] - alien or just tempered with ? The guy that I have talked with did not have much to say, and that looked like a dead end, but he gave me some useful information which led to an understanding that it was a part of a seemingly failed “Razvedka” operation. Or maybe someone wanted it to look like that ?
After that - the Astrocrop. Holy shit those guys. They have definitely made a deal with the devil himself, otherwise I do not know who could anyone do THAT kind of mad shit.
Looking for a cure ? Naah, more like testing more and new exotic ways to purge a population of a planet or an asteroid colony. Mixing that with religion and ideology made things even worse. I wonder why no one stopped them and what did CORE really know about all that  …
Next came “Project Artemis”. CORE, again, developing weapons of mass annihilation, for peace and prosperity of course. I have found their r’n’d complex, but it was unreachable.
Add to that an audio log that clearly showed they have lost a “device” in transit … More reasons to be excited.
And finally, the famous “Sky Lift”. Several points of view, lots of documents, witnesses confessions … and still nothing certain. All I got out of that was a certainty that it was not just an accident or a “coincidence” or whatever that was. All states that it was planned. By who - that is a really good question.
But all that effort did not go for nothing.
First of all - I now knew the location - Mars. Everything was connected with that. The REPNODE-M7 station which the ship bearing those couplings passed through,  The “Generational Farm” - a major Astrocrop farming complex,  The “Gobbler” outpost - a CORE weapons test site and finally, The Skylift itself. All of that was either on the planet or connected to it in a way.
And yes, those weird radio transmissions that bounced back and forth in space were seemingly originating from here as well, although I had no time to go through that at the time.
But most importantly, after I have reported all that to Aurana, I felt … warmth coming from her. As like she was happy to acknowledge that she was not wrong with me.
Of course they knew about all that stuff, and my job seemed to be to basically get acquainted with the story, aside from testing my skills. But I did not mind. It probably was necessary for what would come next - it was decided that I had to take a ship to that REPNODE station to continue the investigation. It seemed that my employers were lacking a person they can trust, the one that will not back down.  And that was me. At that point I just made up my mind to get to the bottom of all that anyway.
The only mystery remained - who was I really working for. I did not ask directly, in hopes that they will tell me, but they did not until I boarded that ship …
I was hoping that the transit would be uneventful, as it was obvious that the continuation of the contract would take as much effort (if not more), but I guess my employers had other plans.
A “missing person” case got into my hands. A totally random person by the name of Vladimir Semakin that had found my “PI looking for a job” page on the CORIE job center contacted me to help him find a girl named Jean that had disappeared with somewhat threatening circumstances.
If only I knew …
That case led me to several new groups that I got myself somewhat close with:  the Gravers, the PALIMPEST and several other good guys (or not so good) which I can call my friends now.
And that girl, Jean Flanders, happened to be a daughter of the Exar-Solis CTO. A rebellious child that got to know too much and was in danger of getting herself used as a pawn in someone’s game.
That someone happened to be mr. James “Jack” Curtis Fung.  A real ghost, finding whom took me a lot of effort, and after I did … well, let’s say I owe one to a person that nobody would like to be owed to.
He is a threat, a very dangerous person, but as much as I hate to admit - could become a very useful asset. The only problem is that at this point I am his asset, and I have no clue what he would ask from me.
But, he was the person who helped me find the truth about Jean - she escaped and got herself a new life, the one with a purpose. She became someone else.  She became Aurana.
And that when I understood it all - my employers, my TRUE employers, Osiris corp, were looking for people that are not only skilled and strong willed, but share their ideals.
I have never thought much about it before, but finding the truth, whatever the cost, made me feel happy. This job gave me purpose in life, like it did to Aurana. And yes, Vladimir as well, as he was obviously one of them too. A recruiter actually who’s task was to provide a 3rd party opinion on myself.
So here we are.  Landing at the REPNODE-M7 soon enough, as a CEDRT engineer in disguise to proceed with my journey. I feel like I am truly ready for it now.  I have my team, I have my skills and my connections.  All that remains are the right tools for the task. So that is where I’ll start.

Codex/Entry-3/Component-board-tx-71revie.title: Component board tx-71review (Tong)
Codex/Entry-3/Component-board-tx-71revie.content:
Component board tx-71review (Tong)
Th?!@#%^&*-i-s c@#%^&!-o-mp^&!@#%-onent bo?!@#%^&-ard is p?!@#%^&*-ri?!@#%^&-x-?!@^%#&*!-?!@#%^&-r-?!@#^&%*!-?!@#%^&-?!@#%^&*-q-&*-?!@#%^&-?!@m-?!@#^&%*!-?!@#%^&?!@#%^&*-?!@#%^&-?!@#^&%*!-?!@#%^&-?!@#%^&*-q-^&*-x-?!@^%#&!-?!@
This component board is primarily used as a base for an advanced drone controller. Although the developer is unknown, the board seems to be fully compatible with different types and classes of aerial drones, enhancing the general performance by 10+ percent on average.
Currently, it can not be bought on the open market as it is still considered a prototype without any active distribution and compliance prohibition.
We are in possession of one of such boards - an earlier prototype and although its less compatible then the later variants we still hope to reverse-engineer it to get more insights into the technology itself.
The board is secured away on the “Koute” asteroid outpost. It is currently very lightly protected as we do not await any possible assaults but the active recommendation is the relocation of the asset as soon as the research funding is reinstated. Please use with caution

Codex/Entry-3/Dossier-C.S.-Tong.title: Dossier C.S.Tong
Codex/Entry-3/Dossier-C.S.-Tong.content:
Dossier C.S. Tong

SUBJECT PROFILE: C.S. TONG
// Full Name:            Christopher Selm Tong
// Position:             AN-RING 2 Engineer
// Current Assignment:   REPNODE-M7

An Ring 2 Engineer that has been working on several CEDRT space stations
across the solar system. His relatives all served the CORE, most of them in
the CCS corps on Venus and Luna.
Christopher (Chris) has a strong character and is respected by his
colleagues and subordinates. He has been raised to the rank of Overseer
through his hard work and without any compromising circumstances.
Current position at the REPNODE-M7 is not accidental - he has asked for a
transfer to that station due to some “personal affinity with Martian
tragedy”. Although it might sound suspicious it seems that CIS (Core Intelligence Service) has not found anything that could suggest a hidden
agenda. At least that is the information that we were able to acquire.

Chris is a tech-savvy person that has multiple hobbies, including drone
construction, which takes most of his personal time.
No immediate family is recorded, no wife or kids. No information about any
significant other as well. The guy is keeping his stuff to himself.
His colleagues say he plays poker with them from time to time but mostly
keeps things professional. Chris has been spotted playing virtual games on
several occasions (or at least using a VR headset) but no further details
are known.

Summary:
Strict, Professional, Seems to be well educated (need additional
information), Single.

Intel suggestion:
Approach on the basis of professional courtesy or common hobby.

Codex/Entry-3/Email-From-Chris-Tong.title: Email: From: Chris Tong
Codex/Entry-3/Email-From-Chris-Tong.content:
Email: From: Chris Tong
From: Chris Tong
To: Pamela Flow
Topic: Almost done.
Pamela, listen. I know we had our disagreements, and I have left at a terrible moment, but like I promised you - it is almost over. As soon as I give them the drone I will get my freedom.
This means we would be able to reunite, finally, without fear. Please just wait for me and forgive me for all that I have done. You know there was no other way. I need to get to Mars, I need to find the place of my parent’s final rest. I hope you would come with me as you need that closure as much as I do.
No one can know about us, so if you decide to come use that name, not the real one. I will try to acquire you the credentials for a CEDRT employee, it seems it’s the easiest one to get nowadays.
We both need closure and that is our only chance. Remember, I love you Sis, even if we never meet again.
Your’s truly, Chris.

Codex/Entry-3/I-Arrived.title: I Arrived
Codex/Entry-3/I-Arrived.content:
I Arrived
Mars, finally got here. The journey itself was quite something. Might be worth writing a book about it at some point.
Aurana, Vladimir, Jake and so many other people I’ve met. The amount of events that happened in the past few months have been overwhelming. Sometimes I feel like an excited child that is making his first steps into the whole new world. But this world is quite dangerous, and there are certainly multiple people that would prefer that I did not poke my nose into their business right now.
Aurana is right though, I need to refresh my memory on the past events. This would help me to move forward. The secrets of this planet did not go anywhere and I feel that the circle is getting smaller.
I got here to uncover all those mysteries and that is what I would have to do, nothing changes.

Codex/Entry-3/Market.title: Market
Codex/Entry-3/Market.content:
Market
Alright, here’s the market. Hmm… looks like I need the Cypher+ v1.4 program, but I don’t have enough credits to buy it. Damn…
But wait, there are Jobs here. Maybe I can find something that’ll get me the credits I need. Definitely worth checking out.
And it seems that once I get the program, I’ll have to change my LOADOUT to make it active. Thankfully, nothing too complicated - just open it and install.
Live and learn…

Codex/Entry-3/Unknown-File.title: Unknown File
Codex/Entry-3/Unknown-File.content:
Unknown File
Okay, so it looks like the file is here, but I have never seen an extension like that. It requires a specialized program to open, which I do not have. I need to talk to Aurana and ask her to help.

Codex/Entry-3/Worth-Checking.title: Worth Checking
Codex/Entry-3/Worth-Checking.content:
Worth Checking
Task complete, and I’m on my own again. Still, I think it’s worth going back to that server - maybe I’ll find something relevant.

Codex/News/News_Bulletin_1.title: News Bulletin #1
Codex/News/News_Bulletin_1.content:
News Bulletin #1
Secrets of SOYUZ
Cargo freighter “Solaris” has been found in Deep Space Zone 31 near Venus.
The freighter went missing several years ago, allegedly while delivering a weapons shipment from one of the asteroid weapon factories. The point of origin of that shipment has been erased from the navigation logs, authorities say.
Remaining navigational charts suggest that the ship had at some point been passing near Deimos, a Martian moon that is part of a “no fly” zone enforced by the Perpetual Council.
Officer Kamal Sindu, a representative for Council Security commented that no crew (or their remains) were found onboard the ship. No further information has been provided so far due to ongoing investigation.

Codex/News/News_Bulletin_3.title: News Bulletin #3
Codex/News/News_Bulletin_3.content:
News Bulletin #3
Generations farm, Astrocrop
A farming festival has been held on the “Smuglianka” agricultural station. Located near Venus, the station is one of the most favoured tourist attractions in that area of space.
Although officially belonging to SOYUZ, many agricultural companies have their offices on the station, supporting the research of new crops for human space stations and colonies.
One of the scientists - German Titov had something to say on that matter:
“We receive seed materials from all over the solar system. Our experiments are top tier, there is no other place in the known universe that has such advanced research facilities, especially since that incident … Anyway, I am very proud to work here with my colleagues and just would like to thank our comrades from SOYUZ and friends from Astrocrop that provide us with the best bio materials to work on. We promise to make the life of space travellers even better!”

Codex/News/News_Bulletin_5.title: News Bulletin #5
Codex/News/News_Bulletin_5.content:
News Bulletin #5
“Sky Lift”
Today marks the 6th anniversary of a “drifting lift” - a part of a Sky Lift that has been detached from its planetary foundation. Scientists are still monitoring its orbit, now confirming that it will likely stay in the solar system.
Although the object itself was deemed not dangerous to any colony or major space station, its spin is still somewhat unpredictable, which means any smaller stations or satellites on its path are likely to be in grave danger.

Codex/News/codexprogressnews_2title_v1.title: codex.progress.news_2.title_v1
Codex/News/codexprogressnews_2title_v1.content:
codex.progress.news_2.title_v1
WEAPON EXPERIMENTS (railgun, miner outpost)
A live weapon test has been performed on a freshly developed “LRMD” (long range matter disintegrator) by CORE Arms. The spokesman Thomas Albertson had the following to say: “After a series of unfortunate setbacks we are finally ready to present a new weapon system for the Council navy. Its implication in future ship designs intimidates any pirate or criminal that would think about raiding. CORE Arms is still adamant on offering only the best solutions to those who fight for humanity”.
Although such a statement could be considered vague at best, rumor has it that each of the major factions are already lining up to acquire the new weapon, before the “intended” buyer.
Our investigators were able to uncover information that these so-called “LRMDs” are a result of the continuation of “Project Artemis” that notoriously failed about 4 decades ago, leading to catastrophic destruction on several test sites. Most information about the events of those years are still kept secret from the general public, but with the re-surfacing of that project we will try to keep you updated. Stay tuned!

Codex/News/codexprogressnews_4title_v1.title: codex.progress.news_4.title_v1
Codex/News/codexprogressnews_4title_v1.content:
codex.progress.news_4.title_v1
“The Voices”,  Cult of Mars, Radio transmissions
Several ships passing near the orbit of Neptune have reported strange transmissions that have been recorded by the ships high frequency radio antennas. Although the recordings seem to be mostly corrupt and/or encrypted, it is clear that there is some sort of a voice trying to reach out. The origins of those transmissions remain unknown.
One of the ship captains, Kumar Abdul had something to say about it to our news crew: “We were passing near Neptune, as always, when suddenly our recording equipment woke up and started recording a signal. It is very strange, we do not know how it came to be. Very strange. Big mystery!”
Although the situation has not been commented on by any authority, our tech expert Sean Bong reminds us that such equipment is considered outdated and is nothing more than slightly advanced radio receivers that were used for distress contacts. He also noted that this signal was likely refracted from Neptune’s atmosphere, while its origins are a mystery indeed.
Sean also stated that keeping in mind the cyclicity of the reports about those signals it’s likely that they are originating from one of the bigger “objects” that come into perfect position to be in range of the Neptune trade lane.

[X][LOGO]REPORT
Transcription
POLICE REPORT MISSING PERSON Luna, August 18, 2250

Report by
Sergeant McMaffee, stationed : ██████████
CSPS station 3 (council security patrol station).

██████████████████████, 28 years old.
Reporting - her mother, Suzanna Flanders, 64 years old.

Mother claims that her daughter went for a drive with her boyfriend, by the name of ██████ Daughter claimed to be going to the nearest spaceport “for a spin”. Last seen exiting interstate 65, heading to the private launch site ██████████

Investigation:
The launch site is private property and protected by the local ████████ PMC. Access is restricted without a warrant. The cameras alongside the highway were partially malfunctioning that day, although the recording shows 1 car of a fitting description heading towards the spaceport.The security guards at the gate claim that the car has not entered the premises, inclining that it could have turned several kilometers before that.

The drone area scan around the launch site showed no trace of a car, yet the insides of the territory could not be scanned because of the privacy protection jammers.
Automated patrols that were also dispatched found no trace of the car outside of the launch site perimeter.
Solution: Requesting search warrant.
Additional: ██████████
A witness has been found.
████████████████, 54, Garbage disposal manager.
Witness statement:
I was minding my own business, staying near the launch side, as always, when a crazy guy ran out of the guarded area, eyes wide open. I think he was drooling or something.
As soon as he saw me, he approached me and started shouting something like ” VLADIMIR - WE HAVE A CRIMINAL - MOUNT THE HORSES”.
I have no clue what that meant. And I did not know that guy or how he knew me. But I am kinda a regular in those parts so everyone knows me anyway.
The guy ran towards the nearby hills. I decided to follow because I was worried about him.
It seemed as if he was looking for something. Then he literally pushed a rock and some voice said ” Please state your name and rank”. He started shouting for no reason but then got a hold of himself and said ████████████████████
Then a garage door slid away. But before he could enter, a ████████ patrol car got to him. They dragged him inside the vehicle and left. It looks like they didn’t see me.
After they left I went to check on that garage, but was not able to find that stone he pushed or turned or whatever. So i just left. I can show the location but please keep my name out of it. I don’t want any trouble.
                                                             *F-10bt-ust.corie*

SEARCH PARTY
REPORT August 21, 2250

███████████████████████████ CSCH (council security central hub)
A search and rescue team has been dispatched after the witness statement was acquired. Upon arrival
at the target area, after a thorough scan of the location, an artificial hill with a cavity in it was found.
Inside, a partially disassembled vehicle was located. Most parts of the vehicle have been removed but
the remains fit the description of the car the Daughter was last seen in.
Near the car, several barrels with some ████████ were located. Preliminary analysis indicates some
████████ Further more tests are required. Traces of multiple DNA’s were found on the barrels as well.

Suspect in question - █████████████████████ Ex military, corporate forces, PMC operator.
Whereabouts unknown.
The launch site is sealed, no personnel present. The automatic security system is armed and requires
additional codes for access. Further investigation and a property sweep is required.
